The other players will decide whether they believe you or not. If any opponent doesn't believe you, you must reveal the cards and take the consequences. If you lied, you'll go back squares. If you told the truth, you'll move forward and the player or players who doubted you will move backward.
If no player doubted what you said, you'll move the number of squares declared, ignoring the real value of your cards.

Players take turns and advance through the modular map, which is full of traps and bonuses. The first player to reach the end of the path with his or her flea is the winner.

Can you help two star-crossed lovers escape the clutches of their prejudiced families? Romeo and Juliet is a card game for the whole family based on Shakespeare’s famous play.

3 to 5 players must outmanoeuvre the other players to guide Romeo and Juliet to safety and true love in Verona. Gameplay is easy to learn but challenging to master.

10 cards are placed face-down on the table representing the city of Verona. Hidden among the cards are Romeo and Juliet. players take turns secretly looking at and switching places of cards.

The player who manages to move Romeo and Juliet to their meeting place, and then reveal them wins the round and gets a point. At intervals, a player is forced to turn a card face-up for the rest of the game. Should both Romeo and Julia end up revealed this way, the revealing player has lost the round and everyone else gets a point.

The first player to score 3 points wins the game.

—description from the publisher

Solitaire statistical replay game of the sport of Olympic Weightlifting. Realistically rated historical and/or contemporary lifters compete in Olympic Weightlifting competitions, including every Olympic Games where this sport was present and other historical state and national Olympic Weightlifting competitions. As in 'real' Olympic Weightlifting competitions, each lifter has 3 "lifts" in each discipline (eg: snatch, clean & jerk), with the highest combined total declared the winner.

Natal Seas is an ocean themed, dynamic-territorial game played on the cells ('waters') of a hexagonal grid in the shape of the Pacific Ocean. Each piece abstractly represents a pod of Orcas or Humpback whales.'
 The goal is to add and move your pods until the other player's pods are permanently excluded from over half the waters of the board.

To start, one player places 

     2 Orcas pods anywhere on the board, and 
     1 grey Humpback pod next to one of them. 


Then the other player chooses which kind of pods to play.

Humpbacks begin the regular alternating turns.

Each turn has:

     A. two required 'birthing' actions (placements), and 
     B. a maximum of one 'migration' action (optional movement)


The migration may be taken at anytime during the turn.

The 'Birthing' Action:
consists of placing a new pod on 'water safe for birthing', that is an unoccupied water cell next to more friendly than unfriendly pods.

The 'Migration' Action:

     One pod begins migrating around another pod (of either type) by moving to a cell of open water that is next to them both. 
     The first pod may continue to skirt pods in this manner for as far as it likes. 


-- HOWEVER, The migrating pod may never:
-- * move to or through water that is safe for unfriendly birthing; that is, it may not move to water that has more unfriendly than friendly pods around it. Be sure to count the migrating pod when comparing.
-- * move away from all the neighboring pods, even if it would reach other pods by doing so.

Natal Seas:
Areas that the unfriendly pods can no longer ever enter are called 'natal seas' because they are effectively reserved for the birthing of friendly whale pods.

Ending the game:
When your pods, together with all your natal seas cover over half the board, you win. If you are the player that set up the first three pieces, you win when you cover exactly half the board, as well.

The king is dead and there is no clear heir. You are the leader of a noble family seizing on the opportunity to capture the throne for yourself.

Lucrum is a two player strategy board game where you and your opponent attempt to claim the throne by raising the most gold. Careful deployment and strategic application of force in battle, along with securing key terrain features are all needed as you vie to accumulate the most wealth.

Players use advantage tokens to move units across the board, accumulate wealth and influence battles during the six turns of the game before finally tallying up their gold to see who has successfully claimed the throne.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Coral Sea Carrier Clash: Scenario for Flattops & Floating Fortresses
description:
In this thrilling high-seas scenario for Flattops & Floating Fortresses, we take a deep dive into one of history's most monumental naval battles. 
Experience firsthand the rush and the tension as over the horizon carriers go head-to-head. 
Immerse yourself in a fast-play naval battle with exciting and unexpected rules on weather, deployment, and the pursuit of unseen adversaries. 
With detailed profiles and stats on the Allied and Imperial Japanese fleets, the guide offers an up-close look at renowned vessels like the Lexington, Yorktown, Shoho, Zuikaku, and Shokaku, along with a vast array of naval aircraft. 
'Coral Sea Carrier Clash is more than just a scenario-it's your passport to reliving an iconic chapter of naval history!

So gear up for a gripping adventure into the depths of naval warfare, where strategy, anticipation, and the thrill of the chase will have your heart racing.

Note: This is a scenario reference book only. To best enjoy the game you'll also need access to

     Flattops & Floating Fortresses advanced rules or Anchors Aweigh beginner rules
     Naval models
     Damage cards, threat cards and Decorations cards.

The Shivers crew gets out of the Manor and into the surrounding town! They find themselves drawn into the Fogmoor Museum, its enormous hall filed with exotic dioramas, ancient relics, puzzling exhibits, and even an enormous skeletal dinosaur! How will they get in, how will they get out, and what will the Shivers discover when trapped inside?

This series contains four new episodes, new standees, and the enormous pop-up museum.

-description from designer

A new room is found in the depths of Fogmoor Manor, an ancient medieval dungeon! First, the Shivers crew has to find their way across a bottomless pit, or perhaps into it? Upon discovering the dungeon, they'll see a hideous iron maiden, with groaning from within. Next to it, the guillotine stands poised, ready to fulfill its lethal purpose. Will the Shivers make it out alive?

This series features 4 new episodes, new standees, and the Deadly Dungeon pop-up room.

-description from designer

C.O.R.E is a fast-paced skirmish game where Mech pilots and their machines clash to further the goals of their Faction.

The mechanics behind C.O.R.E are designed to be easy to pick up, but with a depth that is very rewarding to master.

C.O.R.E will reward its players lots of great narrative moments. Will you take control of a plucky team of green pilots, eager to pick apart a veteran in a heavy Mech and make a name for themselves? Or will you build a Mech that relishes close combat, smashing buildings aside as you charge towards your foe?

Contained Within:

     Complete Rules for 1/144 (10mm) scale Mech battles in a near-future Sci-Fi Cold War setting
     Play two different game modes - hop right in to the action with C.O.R.E Operations or engage in total warfare with Colony War 
     Rules to create your own Mech units. Field endless possibilities - replicate machines from popular fiction, or create your own!
     Add further flavour to your games with rules for 5 Factions 
     Wage war in six varied missions
     Includes Mech stat cards and Colony War unit reference cards!


This product contains assets that were procedurally generated with the aid of creative software powered by machine learning.

boardgame: Primordial Steel: Sword and Sorcery Skirmish Battles in a Lost Age
description:
The Earth is older than we know, our best guesses millions of years wrong. 
Just as the Earth orbits the sun, so too does life on our world move in cycles. 
Creatures rise, evolve and then go extinct, only to re-emerge once more.

Primordial Steel is a fast-paced miniatures skirmish game for two players, where ancient forgotten civilisations clash for power. 
Designed to be miniatures agnostic and to work with players’ existing historical fantasy collections, Primordial Steel features an exciting world created by bestselling author Tracy Gregory

Featuring a unique game system that puts the focus on moment-to-moment tactics and with nine distinct factions to choose from, Primordial Steel is a game that brings the excitement of battle to the tabletop like no other.

Contained Within:

     Complete Rules for 28mm scale fantastical battles in a forgotten time with an innovative turn structure.
     Nine distinct and unique factions each with its own culture and rules. Each has been designed so that fantasy and historical wargamers can use their existing collections.
     Six different missions.
     Lore by bestselling fantasy author Tracy Gregory. Explore a dark fantasy world that was once our own.


This product contains assets that were procedurally generated with the aid of creative software powered by machine learning.

A fast-paced and exciting game of tank-on-tank action, Tank-Duel Arcade lets you play out thrilling battles in thirty minutes or less!

All you need are 2+ Tank Models, some Dice and a Tape Measure. 
Each player controls each of their tank's crew members (Gunner, Driver, and Commander) as they act out your orders in turn. 
Do you activate the Gunner first to get a shot off early, or use the Driver to get a better shot into the flank of an opponent?

Tank-Duel Arcade is miniatures and scale agnostic, and can be used for battles from the dawn of WW1 to modern conflicts.

-Description from the publisher
Defend against 5 new Kaijus on an all-new map. Includes additional Solo Mode content as well.

boardgame: Gloomhaven (Second Edition): Cabin in the Corpsewood (Promo Scenario)
description: A promo scenario for the 2nd edition of Gloomhaven related to Good Time Society. The scenario was made freely available during Gloomhaven Grand Festival on BackerKit on June 27, 2023 via the project update “Great streams and the second edition faction narrative”.

A promo scenario for Frosthaven related to Pixel Circus. The scenario was made freely available on July 14, 2023 via Frosthaven’s Kickstarter campaign update #137 “Frosthaven play surface books (and more) on Backerkit“.

A promo scenario for Frosthaven related to Penny Arcade. The scenario was made freely available during Gloomhaven Grand Festival on BackerKit on June 29, 2023 via the project update “Running monsters in the RPG and more about Forteller”.

The Zombies are at the gates! 
Z: The Last Stand is a fantastic new tabletop game for 1 or more players as they fight their last fight against an ever growing zombie horde!

Play out solo or with some friends as you play as a survivor in a world over run by the zombie menace! 
With simple yet effective game mechanics, 3 set missions, an array of familiar weapons and super-zombies, you can be sure of this being one of out best microgames yet.

Scale agnostic, just like many of our offerings, Z: The Last Stand can be played with whatever models you have to hand, at whatever scale is convinient (playing at greater than 1:1 may produce problems the Nth Level does not accept responsibility for...)

-Description from the publisher

Play your Ducks' skills, trick and trick your friends while earning your Blue Ices in this fun game of dice, hidden roles and pompadour!
During the game, each player will pour a glass of alcohol and place it on their DUCK card, using it as a coaster.
It is played in successive turns:
Players will be able to use the ability of a duck or roll and assign a die to a player. When a player collects three identical dice, he or she will perform the dice type action between adding a blue ice, taking a drink, or taking two drinks.

Golden rules: if for any reason you raise your glass you must take a drink, and you win a red ice.
In this game you can lie and declare that you have another duck and use his ability normally, other players may doubt your declaration. If you lied take a red ice, if you told the truth whoever doubted takes a red ice and you play the skill normally.

If you receive three red ices you are out of the game, you must drink your entire drink at once.

The game ends when someone manages to collect three blue ice, it is the winner or there is only one player left at the table, it is the winner.

Spanish---
¡Juega las habilidades de tus Patos, engaña y haz tomar a tus amigos mientras ganas tus Hielos Azules en este divertido juego de dados, roles ocultos y copete!

Durante el juego cada jugador se servira una copa de su bebida favorita y la ubicara sobre su carta de PATO, usandola como posavasos.
Jugaran turnos sucesivos:
los jugadores podran usar la habilidad de una pato o lanzar y asignar un dado a un jugador. Cuando un jugador junte tres dados iguales realizara la acción del tipo de dado entre: ganar un hielo azul, beber un trago o beber dos tragos.

Reglas de oro: si por cualquier razon levantas tu vaso debes tomar un trago, y ganas un hielo rojo. 
En este juego puedes mentir y declarar que tienes otro pato y usar su habilidad con normalidad, otros jugadores pueden dudar sobre tu declaración. Si mentiste toma un hielo rojo, si decias la verdad quien dudo toma un hielo rojo y tu juegas la habilidad con normalidad.

Si recibes tres hielos rojos estas fuera del juego, debes tomar de una vez toda tu bebida.

El juego se acaba cuando alguien logre juntar tres hielos azules o quede solo un jugador en mesa es el ganador.

Strange Occurrences At Sea (SOS) is a turn based, asymmetric action game for 2 players. 
One player takes command of a vessel and her crew as they brave treacherous waters on the open ocean. 
The other controls a vicious sea monster, intent on sinking the misguided ship, and killing all its crew.

Each turn the monster and the crew act in turn; 
can the monster sink the vessel? 
Can the crew defeat the monster whilst keeping their ship afloat?

This game includes the full rules as well as a game board and some handy cut-out game pieces (although a few miniatures of your own couldn't hurt...).

-Description from the publisher
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

boardgame: Hunter-Hunted: A Campaign for Zona Alfa-Kontraband
description:
'Hunter-Hunted is a starter campaign for Osprey Wargames Zona Alfa: Salvage and Survival in the Exclusion Zone. 
Utilizing new material from the solo/cooperative Kontraband expansion, this is a quick way to dive into Deep Zone runs with a few stalwart comrades.

You will need those books to use this material.
Comes with pre-gen characters and offers die table option for POI Hazards and Hostiles.

Enjoy and Good Hunting.

'description from the publisher's website

Carolyn, having survived the horrifying night at Creech Manor all those years ago, is now a teenager. She swore to get revenge on the entity of the manor that took everything (except her life and Mr. Floppy) from her.  She has been growing and honing her psychic powers, studying and practicing each and every day for this moment.  She pauses outside looking up at the old Manor to experience her feelings. Her eyes begin to glow slightly as she only finds one emotion present... it isn't fear or trepidation... no... it is the need for REVENGE. Carolyn closes her eyes and focuses here psychic energy. When she opens them, she stands in the foyer. "Where are you Helen? You sardonic bitch!"

It is time to bring the fight to the Poltergeist (or can be used with any other Killer of your choosing!). Carolyn's revenge features a new Final Girl, with all-new special Action cards that will let her use her psychic abilities to make psychic attacks, teleport, and even psychically attune weapons and items so that they can be used to deal psychic damage to the Killer. Once you have amassed enough psychic damage on the killer, you can attempt to banish them to limbo forever by succeeding with the Psychic Expulsion Action card!

This Sequel character pack (standard SG) comes with several cards (final amount to be determined) of the Action Card, Item Card, and Final Girl card variety plus a Secret Envelope for Carolyn. Plus for those going for the miniatures, you will get a teenage Carolyn Miniature (premium SG)!

This pack can be used against ANY killer, at ANY location. It essentially creates an alternate win condition for you.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
"The Faerie Market opens at dawn. There are many strange and wonderous items to be had in the markets, for a price, and I've instructed other apprentices in the market to trade with you as well. Return to me when you have the items and I shall give you other chores. Continue to serve well and I shall be mightily impressed. Be warned, Time passes strangely in Faerie, and Beware deals with the Fae."

As an apprentice to an absent-minded wizard in town, you've been sent to the strange and wonderous Faerie Markets to do some shopping. Trade for Magical items, use them to gain an advantage, and even make deals with the fairies themselves. Compete with other apprentices to bring back the goods, and beware deals with the Fae."

Fairy Market is a 2-4 player game in which you will trade goods with an ever-changing market, racing to complete lists for the Wizard. Strategize how to get the cards you need, without letting others know what you're after. Play cards to change the market, change your hand or even lock your opponents options, but beware, the market can be unpredictable. When someone has completed a decided number of lists, how many lists were completed, and how accurately, are tallied for points. The player with the most points wins.

Includes rules for either a lighter game or a more strategic "Timeless Realm" Variation.

-description from designer

An active and energetic game where you move the car with your finger to accomplish food delivery goals! Don’t take your finger off the car, do not topple the clock tower or move the car from the board.  Gather as many points as possible to win the game!

All players work for Tangle Dash, in a highly competitive work environment where the best courier is declared the employee of the month! To win, collect the most points by completing food orders, without toppling the City Hall clock tower or removing your finger from your car (or your car from the board).

Watch out for other players’ hands and don’t get tangled!

Play the competitive or the cooperative mode in this fun family game full of humour, speed and surprising situations!

boardgame: Arena: The Contest – The Mythical Phoenix
description:
The Mythical Phoenix  features villain cards for both incarnations of the Phoenix, in addition to a new card for the innovative Kemet Hunt rule that incorporates the Phoenix's gameplay mechanics. As a recurring antagonist throughout your campaign, the Phoenix becomes integral to your game narrative. The Penumbral Phoenix emerges as an adversary at the first level of the Kemet Hunt, while the formidable Hellfire Phoenix appears at level six.

Incorporating the Phoenix into your campaign will add an intriguing layer of novelty to the Kemet Hunt system. In the first level, the Penumbral Phoenix arrives as your opponent after the first enemy killed on a quest, entering the fray in a blaze of flames, wreaking havoc amongst nearby combatants. Should you progress to the daunting Kemet Hunt level 6, you will face the powerful Hellfire Phoenix bringing even greater challenge to your heroes.

These awe-inspiring mystical creatures, native to the Darkall continent, have been bound by Kemet's necromantic magic. They now roam the skies of Tanares, seeking out the energies of death and arriving in a spectacular fiery display.

The Phoenix undoubtedly enhances the Kemet Hunt system. Along with a refined Kemet Hunt we developed for all backers, those who pledge for the Phoenix will also have the option of using this stunning miniature and distinct villain, offering a unique new mechanic.

boardgame: Arena: The Contest – The Silver Dragon
description:
Our latest addition to the dragon family! This giant miniature comes with its own quest and Boss Fight, adding an extra layer to your Tanares Adventures main campaign without consuming your weekly gameplay time.

An extra Boss Fight during your Tanares Adventures campaign, offering a unique special reward. Includes a miniature that might even surpass our Gold Dragon in grandeur!

The constant struggle for power in the old land has already wearied the Jarls of the North. Rumors have it that there are still lands where no human foot has set foot. This challenge is worthy of a true Viking!

Skalvenia is an area control game, based on worker placement and deckbuilding mechanics. Players strive to reach uncharted land to establish their settlement there. However, they must not forget about the old land, wise development, and balanced access to resources. Above all, they must keep in mind their warriors and their ships, as it is through them that they will have a chance to defend against the encroachments of other players and win the race to the new land - Skalvenia!

—description from the designer

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Faith & Anarchy
description:
This new expansion lets you play two of D.E.I.'s most controversial factions: the followers of the Cult of Crono and the untamed Breachers.

The former have risen from the ashes of an ancient religion.
At a time when every living being seeks hope for survival, this new and inclusive faction is rapidly gaining momentum.
Their worship is said to be lost in the origin of time, but traces of its passage can be found in every age.
Crono, their god, helps and guides them toward rebirth and toward the future.

The latter, the Breachers, are considered outcasts, outlawed as anarchists.
They are singled out as those who unleashed the White Death, playing with infrastructure beyond their abilities.
Before the White Death, they unknowingly entered the database of an alien spaceship destined for terraforming, unleashing a new ice age.
They now fight the system imposed by the Purebred seeking redemption.

Paired with these two new factions are two new Drones, one more classic, made available by the Purebred, has a distinctive shape and helps the Factions in different ways by being very eclectic. The second, atypical, is a huge, static cathedral capable of moving things and living beings through time.

Lastly, the icing on the cake, the Cult of Crono can be used in Solo mode, with a system introduced in the White Death expansion with the Faun Faction, introducing new rules to represent the peculiarities of this new Faction.

Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Gùgōng.

To play this realm, you must fill a row of cards. When a card's value is higher than the previous one, you gain a resource. Else, you must pay a resource. Fill the row smartly to collect as many resources as you can and all 6 stars.

-description from publisher

Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Onirim.

To play this realm, you must find your way through a mysterious dream labyrinth. Use dice to draw sun, moon, or key symbols. Open doors to gain resources. And remove nightmares to gain stars. Collect all 6 stars before you wake up.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Rolling Realms: Sleeping Gods Promo Pack
description:
Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Sleeping Gods.

When playing this realm, you face 4 monsters. Use dice to damage the monsters. High numbers deal much damage, low numbers award resources. Defeat all monsters and remove all venom to gain all 6 stars.

-description from publisher

Expand your copy of Rolling Realms with this set of 6 promo cards, inspired by Apiary.

To play this realm, you will use low dice rolls to attract new bees, and high numbers to age those bees, bringing resources along the way. Age all 6 bees into hibernation to score all stars.

-description from publisher

norT is a two-player futuristic programmable-movement Print and Play racing game that plays out on a 20x20 grid. Players must avoid the outer walls, explosive mines, and even each other.

Players choose from three different racecars that have different characteristics: a car that's easier to turn will have less varied special abilities.

At the start of each turn, the race grid is covered so it can no longer be seen.

Two D6s are then rolled. The numbers rolled indicate possible Speed values. A single die result can be used for its face value, or the two face values can be added together or subtracted. So a roll of 3 and 4 present valid choices of either 3, 4, 7, or 1.

After the roll, players try to be the first to call out a Speed Value and a Direction (Left, Right, or Straight). If the fastest player's Speed Value call was valid, they have won the 'Call', and the player marks on the paper what they called out. The other player will then, at their leisure, choose a different valid Speed Value, as well as a Direction, and marks this on the paper.

Only after both sets of movements are written down is the game grid uncovered, and lines are drawn indicating where the cars have traveled. The player who won the call draws their line first.

A player wins when their opponent explodes. If both racers survive 18 rounds, then the player who traveled further during the Straights wins.

boardgame: Malware Mayhem Hacker Duel: Chaos Edition
description:
Malware Mayhem Hacker Duel is a two-player face-off using a tower-defense style game must defend their high, medium and low value data which is placed into one of three systems. Each player also has one secret that can be moved between the systems as long as the data is still intact. The objective of the game is to capture the secret.

Each player builds cyberweapons including a botnet, trojans, and zero-day exploits that can be used to attack the opponent's systems. Each system can be defended by firewalls, anti-virus and intrusion detection systems. An attack consists of three phases: breaching the network perimeter, hacking the system, and then in a later turn attempting to capture the data and secrets.

Each hacker is assisted by an Agent who helps raise funds, restores disabled cyberweapons and defenses, or uses one of their unique special abilities (each agent has two) such as sending spam or initiating ransomware. Each hacker can employ up to two agents by hiring or firing from the pool of available agents.

The currency of the game is cryptocoins. The DarkWeb Marketplace allows weapons and defenses to be bought and stolen data to be sold.

The game includes two decks of cards which are used to collect resources and to perform special actions (or enhanced actions).

Malware Mayhem Hacker Duel, Chaos Edition features a hacker duel between the Genius supported by the Researcher agent and Anarchist hacker who is supported by the Prankster agent. Additional agents included in this set are the Vigilante and the Mafioso.

—description from the publisher

Initial Thoughts puts a modern twist on classic trivia. We’re tempted to call it the pop-culture party game of the future, but in truth (and even better), it’s trivia designed to always remain current - even decades from now.

Instead of straight forward questions, players are dealt broad-stroke “thought” cards, each with hundreds of potential answers (e.g. Name a fictional character from a TV sitcom). The catch is their answer can only use a limited set of initials. The more initials their answer uses, the more points scored.

Add to this, a bluffing mechanic. Plus bonus cards that offer unique advantages. It’s an exciting race to the finish as players move around the board. The first to score 40 (or more) points wins. But it’ll take a winning combination smarts and strategy to get there.

-description from designer

Spring has arrived in the Arctic Circle! Players take turns trying to feed the narwhals by adding or subtracting the numbers on their cards and placing treats on the correct answers on the board. Different point values are scored when the narwhal lands on your treat or swims by. The player with the most points at the end of the game wins!

Skills Focus: Addition & Subtraction, Decision Making.

-description from publisher

Crimson Eco is a sci-fi, cyber/magi-punk, manga inspired tabletop skirmish game where two players battle for survival, artifacts, and high value targets in an alternate dimension.

Each player will command a squad of miniatures in fast paced combat.

On the tabletop, each squad member's training and equipment help them secure victory, interact with the battle zone...and stay alive.

-Description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
Car game, license plate game.
Which player can be the first to form a sentence or a combination of words using the letters and numbers from the license plate on the card?
The player who has the most cards wins when the deck has run out.

'LOOM' is a print and play fantasy adventure game. Using a map and character sheet, alongside procedurally generated paragraphs, you will explore a dark and twisted world of fantastical horror. Weave your own story as you play, find rare items, uncover hidden secrets, and use your 'Command List' to interact with the world. With nothing more than playing cards, dice and a pencil, you will generate and play through a story of longing, of defeat, and of a broken world. Deadly foes await, cosmic gods scheme, and the Vale darkens...

At the start of each game, you create a character from a predefined series of options. On your turn, move across the map grid of the Vale by using a movement point. Generate a story paragraph by using a 52 deck of cards and two dice. The story paragraph will dictate which actions are available to you.

Will you fight an enemy or search a building? Assist an NPC with a quest or pray at a shrine? Search for Tracks or Forage for Items? All outcomes and recorded on your character sheet.

Once your movement points are used up, set up camp for the night and hope you get some good rest for the day ahead.

The game ends when you reach the northernmost sanctuary, or your character dies - Only through death however, will you unlock powerful items to aid you in future playthroughs.
Each ending is dictated by the state of the world and your character as influenced by your actions and outcomes.

Which of the game's 30 Endings will you reach this time?

boardgame: Stadt, Land: Das inoffizielle Spiel für Game of Thrones-Fans
description:
No matter where you are - with this exciting City, Country, Game of Thrones edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the table! In 52 categories you can test your fan knowledge and prove your creativity. The game block convinces with cool design and exciting topics - perfect for all fans of the houses Stark, Lannister and Targaryen. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something here for everyone. 
Cause of death, character or typical for the House Targaryen - dive into the world of fire and ice and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the biggest Game of Thrones expert and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required, only then will you manage to shout "Stop!" first. Are you ready? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!

—description from the publisher
family: Books: A Song of Ice and Fire

description: Mini-expansion for The Cursed Menagerie, that includes 3 new ghosts and 1 new object.

boardgame: Stadt, Land: Das inoffizielle Spiel für Herr der Ringe-Fans
description:
No matter where you are - with this exciting City, Country, Lord of the Rings edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the round! In 52 categories you can test your Middle Earth knowledge and prove your creativity. The game block convinces with cool design and exciting topics - perfect for all Tolkien fans. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something here for everyone.
Live in Middle-earth, setting or term from the Shire - dive into the world of the Hobbits and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the greatest Lord of the Rings expert and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required, only then will you manage to shout "Stop!" first. Are you ready? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Der magische Spiel- und Rätselblock für Potter-Fans
description:
No matter where you are, alone or with friends - with this exciting puzzle block for Harry Potter Fans you will always have a lot of fun! Magical quizzes, bewitching crosswords and enchanting bingos - with over 10 different games, you can test your Hogwarts knowledge and put your creativity to the test. With its cool design and exciting themes, the game block will win over every Potter fan, big or small. From simple questions to tricky puzzles - there's something here for everyone. 
Dive into the wizarding world and puzzle your way through the word games - or compete against your friends in "Who's going to catch the Death Eaters" or in the quiz questions! Factual knowledge, creativity and logical thinking are required to solve the tricky tasks. Are you ready to dive into the world of Harry Potter and his friends? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Stadt Land: Das Spiel für Potter-Fans
description:
The classic game in a new format as a fun card game: With this exciting City, Country, Potterhead edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the round! You can test your Hogwarts knowledge and prove your creativity in over 60 categories. With its cool design and exciting themes, the card game will convince every Potter fan, big or small. From simple to tricky categories - there's something here for every wizard's apprentice. 
Scene, spell or school subject? Dive into the world of wizards and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the biggest Potter fan and finds an answer matching the letter and category the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required, that's the only way you'll manage to win. Are you ready to dive into the world of Harry Potter and his friends? Then get to the cards, get set, go!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Borderlands: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery – Tiny Tina
description:
Tiny Tina is joining the party ~ as a Vault Hunter!

Contains:

     Tiny Tina miniature (Borderlands 2 model)
     Vault Hunter Cards

boardgame: Escape-Adventskalender für Minecrafter: Der Angriff des Winter-Withers
description:
All the parents are on an expedition, you kids are alone in the village. It could be so relaxing, staying up late, spending the whole day in your pyjamas, playing with friends ... But the dream could turn into a nightmare: An invasion of zombies, slimes and skeletons is threatening your village! You have 45 minutes - will you manage to save your village? 
In this Escape adventure, everything revolves around the colourful block world. Can you fend off the zombie attack? Find out by solving the 13 tricky puzzles. On your mark, get set, go - the clock is ticking!
family: Misc: Advent / Christmas / Jule calendar game

boardgame: Borderlands: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery – Tiny Tina: Gen Con Edition
description:
Tiny Tina Vault Hunter

This is the adult Tina, modeled after Borderlands 3.

boardgame: Das pferdestarke Quiz: Lia und Lea
description:
The pony-strong knowledge game from the popular social media stars.
The two pony-crazy YouTubers Lia and Lea inspire hundreds of thousands of young and old horse fans every day on their channels and take them through their everyday life on the riding stable. Whether it's a ride, a tournament or the arrival of new ponies - the camera is always with them. You can test your knowledge with their pony quiz.
More than 120 questions in three difficulty levels await you in this horse-powered quiz game. Test your knowledge: How well do you know horses and how well do you know Lia and Lea? An exciting knowledge quiz for all fans of the popular YouTubers: How many teeth does an adult horse have? What colour is Alfi? What kind of hook should you use to lead by the halter? With hidden solutions on each card, cheating is impossible! The perfect gift for all horse fans.

—description from the publisher

In this fun quiz game, you have to reduce spans on a number scale or challenge your fellow players. From geography to history to everyday knowledge, there is something for everyone. And if you don't know anything, you can always question the answer of the others. In this way, the guessing game provides lots of fun and laughs, and you learn interesting facts along the way.
The quiz game with 333 questions about animals, geography, everyday life, pop culture and sport.
Riveting in the Eiffel Tower, distance you can smell a skunk and duration of a Martian year - who can place the ravens correctly and thus narrow down the range of numbers? And who is completely off the mark and therefore doubted? Knowledge, bluffing and a portion of luck are required in this varied quiz game. Grab the ravens and let's go!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Crazy Rules: Wer behält den Überblick?
description:
Whether on the road, at home or as an exciting party game - it's guaranteed not to be boring with this card game. Funny, cheeky and sometimes a bit mean, over 60 crazy rules, prohibitions and tasks are guaranteed to provide fun and variety at birthday parties and school trips. The perfect game to laugh and have fun.
Rules such as "If you draw a card, hold your head crooked" or prohibitions such as "You must not touch the table" must be observed and provide lots of laughs at the table - especially because there are more and more rules. Who can keep track? Perfect for at home, on the road or as a gift.

—description from the publisher

Strong Women - the quiz card game about courageous and strong women

With this quiz game you will get to know the impressive women from the past and present. Be inspired by the very famous and somewhat lesser known personalities and marvel at the special lives of these 64 women. The perfect game for more empowerment.
Learn more about Marie Curie, Anne Frank, Emma Watson and many other women. Who developed the dishwasher and which woman invented the most famous board game of all time? Play against each other or together in a team and answer the questions about the portraits, quotes and quizzes. Perfect for at home, on the road or as a gift.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Erben oder Sterben: Das offizielle Spiel zum Original Krimidinner
description:
With more than 2 million enthusiastic visitors, the Original Krimidinner has been inviting audiences to an incomparable show for over 20 years that is truly not for the faint-hearted! Now the crime fun can finally continue at home with the pitch-black board game Inherit or Die, in which the players go on the hunt for the legendary inheritance of Lord Ashtonburry.
After Lord Ashtonburry's unexpected death, his surviving relatives are greedy for the stately inheritance. The race for the inheritance already begins, in which not only bizarre events complicate the way for the players, but also the treacherous players who want to eliminate their competitors at all costs so that their own share grows. But who will have the most riches in the end? And will everyone really make it to the finish line, or will someone soon be joining Lord Ashtonburry in the afterlife?
The black board game for the Original Krimidinner Show
Inherit or die - who will collect the most inheritance in the end and who will go away empty-handed or even die?
In this family game, the players take on the roles of the Ashtonburry family, who want to secure the largest possible share of Lord Ashtonburry's fortune at all costs. If only there weren't those pesky relatives who also want a piece of the cake ... There's only one thing to do - get rid of the competitors! But watch out, because the other players are trying the same thing. So who will end up with the most inheritance and who will come away empty-handed or even die?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Der Original Krimidinner: Adventskalender – O du Tödliche
description:
With more than 2 million enthusiastic visitors, the Original Krimidinner has been inviting guests to an incomparable show that is truly not for the faint-hearted for over 20 years! Now the crime fun can finally continue at home with the pitch-black Escape Advent Calendar, which has over 24 exciting puzzles, hidden clues and encrypted codes in store. Including a competition to win tickets to the Original Krimidinner Show!

We don't want anything to go wrong at this year's Ashtonburry Christmas Dinner! So Milady hosts a rehearsal dinner in advance, but the dessert has a bittersweet aftertaste as one of the guests ends up with his face in the plum pudding - carried off by prussic acid! With a blizzard raging outside and no one able to enter or leave Darkwood Castle, the case seems clear: there is a treacherous poisoner at the table! But who is it and will he strike again?

In this interactive Advent calendar book with detachable pages, gripping puzzles, encrypted codes and hidden clues await you day after day to help you progress through the story. With the red decoder foil, you can uncover hidden clues and follow new tracks. Will you manage to find a way out in time, or are you possibly the next victim of the poisoner?

—description from the publisher
family: Misc: Advent / Christmas / Jule calendar game

boardgame: Crime & Dine: Das Krimi-Dinner-Set – Mord in Asgard
description:
Invite your guests to an exciting dinner evening on the occasion of the Midsummer Festival in the Asgard theme park. But be warned: murder is on the menu today! As the game's end, you are the main suspects in a mysterious death: The aging amusement park Asgard offers a variety of attractions that thrill young and old alike, but on the evening of this year's Midsummer Festival, the fun comes to an abrupt end as park owner Jare Sandström is suddenly found dead and all the guests are asking themselves the same question: Who did it? Together you take on the roles of the guests and employees of the amusement park and try to find the murderer. Who will think creatively enough and uncover the truth? In the end, will you succeed in solving the case or will you let the perpetrator get away scot-free?

This set contains all the materials you need for an unforgettable mystery party with 5-8 people. With the additional recipes, costume suggestions, decoration ideas and the accompanying playlist, the evening is guaranteed to be a complete success. The mystery game is ideal for a murderously fun evening with family and friends or as an event gift for a birthday.

—description from the publisher

Undercover in Las Vegas: Mafioso Bugsy Siegel has been murdered and you infiltrate the Flamingo Hotel, which Siegel ran until shortly before his death, as undercover FBI investigators on a secret search for the murderer. But a mole has betrayed the operation to the Mafia and a race against time begins! Will you manage to solve the case and escape in time?

A dead mafioso, a hotel full of suspects and a race against time
Thrilling Escape Game to solve over and over again: the game board and course change every time!

In this ultimate Escape Room game for 1 to 4 people, you will become true investigators! Collect clues, combine clues and puzzle your way from room to room. Will you manage to escape the mafia in time and unmask the murderer? Who will think creatively enough and convict the culprit? A gripping crime game to solve over and over again, because the game board and the course of the game change every time!

—description from the publisher

In this gripping crime escape game, you can expect the exciting case of a desperate mother who is looking for her missing child. The village is in turmoil, but the community is silent and the police are treading water. What is being hidden here? Was the child the victim of a crime or does it all turn out to be a tragic accident? Visit all the places related to the case, collect clues as well as evidence, question the witnesses and interrogate your suspects in a thrilling multimedia finale.

A missing child, a desperate mother and a village shrouded in silence - What happened? A kidnapping? A tragic accident? Or an insidious murder?

Join tech nerd Ian, the son of the lead detective, as he takes on the case and collects real evidence. All your investigative progress can be recorded on the evidence board. Who will think creatively enough and convict the perpetrator? Only in the multimedia finale will you see whether you are right with your conclusions. A case for real investigators!

—description from the publisher

Crime Cases - Become an investigator!

The series for all crime puzzle fans: Interactive puzzle adventures with many exciting and mysterious clues and evidence. Can you solve the tricky cases?


     For clever amateur detectives
     Interactive puzzle books with exciting clues and evidence
     Put your powers of observation and logical thinking to the test!
     With detailed solution section


It's crime time: track down mysterious clues, decipher coded messages and crack secret codes - in the interactive mystery puzzle adventures in book form you become an investigator and have to solve exciting criminal cases. Test your powers of observation and put your logical thinking to the test. Will you accept the challenge?

With a detailed solution section to check your results.

—description from the publisher

Every year it's the same: from August onwards, the first Christmas articles are already on the shelves and melting away, Last Christmas blares from the radio and the Christmas madness starts all over again. But not this year! Not with you. Your plan is set: you will spend Advent in your great uncle's old house, far away from all the hustle and bustle. But what starts out as a quiet getaway quickly turns into a real adventure when you find a strange-looking device. Where did it suddenly come from? And more importantly: what is it good for? Your discovery takes you on an unexpected adventure into different eras of the past and possibly even the future...

In this interactive Advent calendar book with detachable pages, gripping riddles, encrypted codes and hidden clues await you every day to help you progress through the story. Use the red decoder foil to uncover hidden clues and follow new leads.

Puzzle your way through the high-quality illustrated story in this Escape Advent Calendar! Can you follow all the clues correctly and solve the mystery of the mysterious time travel machine? Only when all 24 puzzles are solved will you find your way back to your own time. Are you ready for the pre-Christmas thrill and will you be back home in time for Christmas? A real Escape Adventure!

—description from the publisher
family: Misc: Advent / Christmas / Jule calendar game

description:
Self Careless: Deluxe Edition includes the regular Self Careless deck as well as the  Cat Deck.

The Cat Deck lets you play Self Careless in a whole new way! One player is “The Human”, and the other player is “The Cat”. The cat is trying to knock over the human’s coffee and prevent them from having a productive day.

On the cat's turn, they draw two cards from the cat deck and choose which one to play. They are a mix of movement cards to move the cat token and "Anti-Coffee" powers that let you cause various hi-jinks.

If the cat token touches the coffee token it "knocks over the coffee" and it is removed from play until the next successful Task is set by the main player. If the main player loses, the cat wins!

-description from publisher's website

Play as Malaysian MPs trying to build the best constituency you can - but will you use clean or dirty money?

Each turn you choose to draw 3 cards either from the money pile or the action pile (in any combination). The money pile gives you clean or dirty money to spend, while the action pile has buildings/improvements to purchase, reforms to table in parliament and vote on, and events that change gameplay or add a bit of take that. Buying some improvements with only clean money will give a positive side effect.

The game finishes at the end of the round in which someone buys their 7th improvement. Add up the points on the improvements, take a bonus if you were the first to reach 7, or a smaller bonus if you were able to reach 7 after that. Check your hidden goal to see if you have made it. The highest scorer wins, with the tie break being who used least dirty money.

boardgame: Stadt Land: Das inoffizielle Spiel für Potter-Fans
description:
No matter where you are - with this exciting City,Country,Potterhead edition you'll always bring a big portion of fun to the table! In 26 categories you can test your Hogwarts knowledge and prove your creativity. With its cool design and exciting themes, the game block will convince every Potter fan, big or small. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something here for everyone.

Dive into the world of wizards and test yourself and your friends - Which of you is the biggest Potter fan and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required, only then will you manage to shout "Stop!" first. Are you ready to dive into the world of Harry Potter and his friends? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!

—description from the publisher

The card quiz for all Potterheads!

Test your magical knowledge with more than 120 exciting questions and find out if you are a true Potterhead. Puzzle your way through the different levels of difficulty alone or together with other wizarding apprentices. The solutions are hidden on each card - so cheating is impossible! Are you ready for your exam?

Take on the ultimate quiz and puzzle your way through the different difficulty levels. Answer all the questions correctly and prove that you are a true wizard! The practical card box in a handy take-away format is ideal for on the go, at home or as a fun party game. The perfect gift for all fans of the magical world!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Dígalo con Memes: Pack de Expansión #2
description:
Expansion Pack #2 with "new" memes and "new" situation cards for Digalo con memes. To complement the original game or simulate dementia and play with this mini version.
This version has memes updated to 2023

Memmes includes 55 cards and each of them contains eight memes. Don't wonder how, but between two letters, there is always a meme that repeats itself. Yes, you read that right, one, always!
Basically you have to be the first to find the meme that is repeated between your card and the middle one.

Shrapnel: The Official BattleTech Magazine brings you more hard-hitting BattleMech action from the heavy-metal wars of the 31st century and beyond—but don’t let your guard down!

No matter the situation, you can stay out of harm’s way by reviewing a most-wanted list of criminals and assassins, a roster of the Marian Hegemony’s Legion of the Dead, technical readouts, unit and planet digests, playable scenarios, a campaign set in the resource-poor wilds of the Third Succession War, and more—all by battle-hardened BattleTech authors and some new boot-camp graduates.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Dígalo con Memes: Pack de Expansión #3
description:
Expansion Pack #3 with "new" memes and "new" situation cards for Digalo con memes. To complement the original game or simulate dementia and play with this mini version.
This version has memes updated to 2023

Leviath is the second episode of "kaiju on the earth" series.

One player will act as a monster "Leviath". Other players will act as a member of Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force. The battle take place in Okinawa. As the location of the monster is a hidden information, defense force players are required to co-operate and determine the location of the monster and capture it before the end of day 4. They are also need to protect their battleships and barriers to avoid serious damage.

boardgame: Dígalo con Memes: Pack de Expansión #4
description:
Expansion Pack #4 with "new" memes and "new" situation cards for Digalo con memes. To complement the original game or simulate dementia and play with this mini version.
This version has memes updated to 2023

This mini expansion for “Vault: A Solitaire Dice Game” was originally designed for BGA, however, you can now play the game at home as well! The rules are the same as the original game, the only difference is that all players get the same game sheet, and the same sets of rolls, as they compete to be the best safe cracker. Will you reign as the Pink Panther, or will your name be forgotten? Find out in Vault: A Den of Thieves!

boardgame: Fire & Stone: Siege of Vienna 1683 – Tactics Promo Cards
description:
Enhance your game of Fire & Stone: Siege of Vienna 1683 with these 2 exclusive Tactics cards, one for the Habsburg player and one for the Ottoman player.

- Strategic Retreat: The Hapsburg give ground to preserve their limited troops. 
- Second Wave: The Ottomans use their numerical superiority to overwhelm the defenders.

This promo card expansion requires a copy of Fire & Stone: Siege of Vienna 1683. Originally available thru the publisher's website.

boardgame: Star Wars: X-Wing (Second Edition) – TIE/sa Bomber Expansion Pack
description:
The iconic TIE/sa Bomber returns to Star Wars: X-Wing in this pack! TIE/sa Bombers are capable of delivering an astonishing payload in Imperial squadrons, and this pack puts two of these at players' disposal. In addition to these two miniatures, this pack bolsters squadrons with 4 standard loadout cards that invite players to jump into the action right away as well as 8 ship cards and 14 upgrade cards that give players the freedom to fine-tune their TIE/bombers.

Contents:
2 Ships & Stands
8 Ship Cards
  ‣ 1 "Deathfire"
  ‣ 1 Captain Jonus
  ‣ 1 Tomax Bren
  ‣ 1 Major Rhymer
  ‣ 2 Scimitar Squadron Pilot
  ‣ 2 Gamma Squadron Ace
4 Standard Loadout Cards
  ‣ 1 "Deathfire"
  ‣ 1 Captain Jonus
  ‣ 1 Tomax Bren
  ‣ 1 Major Rhymer
16 Upgrade Cards
3 Punch Sheets

family: Game: Star Wars X-Wing Miniatures Game

description:
Sneaky Snakes is all about bluffing and making your friends mad! You will get a hang of it in less than 5 minutes with each game lasting 10. Your goal of the game is to have the biggest snake by the end of the game, which means having the most cards in your hand. The game end is triggered the moment when the last card is drawn from the draw pile.

You start the game by seeing only half of your hand, while the other half you can't see, but other players can.

Start of your turn, you draw one card facing away from you, but visible to others.

Then you choose between 2 actions: play or point.
If you play, you play any 1 card from your hand (can even gamble with those you can't see) and apply the action.
Point action is where the bluffing part takes the stage. You point to any player's card which is visible to you. Without looking at it, the player then decides whether they should play it or let you play it. That's the heart of the thrill, the revealing moments, and most of the emotional rollercoasters happen during the point actions.

The game continues until, as stated earlier, the last card is drawn from the draw pile.

A new public task card given out at SPIEL '23. It shows two public tasks, one of the back and one on the front, labelled PPT1 and PPT2.

In order to fulfil PPT1, a player has to have one food production, one energy production, and one steel production on the New World.
Playing it costs one food, increases steel production on the New World by one, and awards three points at the end of the game.

In order to fulfil PPT2, a player has to have six population and/or factories on the New World.
Playing it costs one steel, increases food production on the New World by one, and awards four points at the end of the game.

Hoard the Hams is a hilarious card game for the whole family.  Easy to play but surprisingly deep.

What is it all about?

1.Hoard the most Hams!

It’s in the name bro!  Whoever has the most Hams at the end of the game wins.

2. Steal from Others!
Make your pile bigger, and make their pile smaller by using the time honored tradition of theft.

3. Protect what You've got!
When you still it's cool but when they steal it's lame.  Protect yourself from those DIRTY THIEVES by placing trap hams.

4. Take Care of Yourself!
Help yourself without hurting anyone else because we all deserve a little self care.

5. Counter Attack!
Even the best plaid plans can be turned on their heads!  Use reaction cards as a last minute counter.

6. Strategize!
Strategize the best combo of placing traps, stealing cards, taking care of yourself, and counter attaching to come out on top in Hoard the Hams!

-description from designer

boardgame: Hostage Negotiator: Career – Year 0 Promo Cards
description:
Includes 5 Year 0 promo cards to optionally be used at the start of a Career.

-description by the publisher's website

A promotional die that has successes on 5 sides! But if you roll an X, you lose!

-description from publisher's website

A tabletop co-opetition card game where you play as tables in a world of inanimate objects where you must fight and steal to be on top!

What is Tabletop Tussle?
Tabletop Tussle is a board game where you and your friends will play through the adventure booklet together playing as the tables you pick. You will each pick a hat for your character and subclass card at random.
If you have the retail game you just pick a character card.

Your goal throughout the game is to gain as much money as possible. Whether that will be stealing from each other or defending your money from others, it is yours to pick.
Gameplay
You will play through an adventure booklet that will take you on quests with your long lost friends who have rejoined to talk about your glory days and you all decide it would be fun to do a few quests while you are all together.

You pick one of the four quests available. Doesn’t matter which order it depends on what your group wants to do. Then you head off and find the old table kings armor or help a village under attack it's completely up to you!

When you are confronted by an enemy everyone will have 1 choice to make. Either Attack, Block or Steal.
Attack will just damage the target you are aiming for and if you have an ability to use you can do so.
Block will stop anyone trying to steal from you.
Steal is where you actively avoid helping your teammates and steal their money. Even though enemies can still attack you.

When you finish killing an enemy rewards will be handed out either in money form or in loot.

Loot will help you gain armor and attack strength or it can give you a hidden item that can be used at certain points of your adventure.
Possibly gain a wolf companion.

Win or lose

If you happen to lose all your health and end up dying, it’s ok it isn’t the end of the world, you just miss out on the juicy rewards of the current mission. Also! Everyone can steal from your dead body and you won’t be able to protect yourself!

When you finish your quests and adventure you will all count up how much money you have and whoever has the most in the end will be crowned victorious and everyone else will be crowned envious!

-description from designer

You have been sent to the fringes of the known world to start a new colony for your Emperor. In this game you will Explore new lands, Build a thriving city, Fight your opponents and try to Survive. What will be your history?

Matchbox Empires uses a unique fog of war tile mechanic. Each player starts with a randomly seeded game board where the terrain tiles all begin face down. They have to explore the area for resources using their 3 unique Hero chracters. Once they finad a place to build their Town Hall, they select a Governor to run the city and steadily create a beautiful 3D isometric city. Using resource gathering the player can continue to expand their population, generate income, unlock more advanced units and build up infrastructure to help achieve their objectives.

The player loses if their Town Hall is destroyed, if their Heroes suffer 3 casualties (collectively) or if an objective is not met.

The player wins if they defeat their opponents and/or meet the victory conditions laid out in the chosen game mode.

The game supports multiple game modes from solo build, solo campaign, coop single player, coop vs, and last player standing.
-description from designer

The MAGMAG Baseball -ALL STAR- is an extension of MAGMAG Baseball.

A total of six character cards, including pitchers and hitters, have been added to enable a much more dynamic game.

Enjoy the game much more conveniently with improved mini game rules and card interface.

—description from the designer

Romantic Crocodile Friends is an extension of romantic Crocodile.

You can enjoy the game much more fun and party-like with the new item card.

A new landmark card has been added for each score. Place your destination card according to your score and enjoy your own world tour course.

—description from the designer

boardgame: High Command: Grand tactical rules for the second World War
description:
Where most miniatures rules for the Second World War are low-level tactical, dealing with individual tanks if not individual riflemen, High Command is decisively grand tactical, allowing entire battles, allowing forces consisting of multiple corps to fight it out on a reasonably-sized table over an evening.

—user summary

family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description: These rules are intended for very quick, deadly battles fought between WW2 Schnellboote, MTBs, MGBs and other craft of the “Mosquito Fleets”. They have been designed to be played on a wargamer’s standard 8x6 or 6x4 foot table and hence missile ranges have been heavily compressed. The current rules cover coastal forces boats, small surface ships (up to destroyers) and fighter aircraft only.

Badgers love a good party! In Zechdachs - Badger Bash, you cooperatively build the den for the badgers' party. Each evening, one of the seven badgers is the host. They each have their own ideas about the perfect party and how much it should cost. So, a new badger den is quickly dug, and guest rooms are set up. Everything is fine and dandy, except for all the uninvited guests who like to drop by spontaneously...

—description from the designer

boardgame: Borderlands: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery – Box of Badasses
description: 18 Vault Hunters, new Loot and Bounty opportunities with unique opponents.

boardgame: Borderlands: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery – Moxxi

boardgame: Marvel Zombies: A Zombicide Game – Agent Coulson Promo Cards
description: A set of Super Hero ID card + Enemy Super Hero card for Agent Coulson (Marvel Zombies – A Zombicide Game) given out at GenCon 2023.

Engage in maritime warefare, deliver goods, and rid the sea of pirates. Or become a pirate and plunder the riches for yourself. In Mint Privateers, players must earn enough fame to win.

Players can earn fame by sailing around the Caribbean to capture or sink ships, raid merchants, deliver in demand goods, buy ships, deposit gold at their home port, or complete objectives on story cards. In order to perform these actions, players will need to assign their crew dice properly. It is also important to upgrade your ship or complete scuttlebutt cards which reward you with game changing effects.

The nature of Mint Privateers being a sandbox game allows players to play the way they want to. Players can play like a merchant by dodging pirate ships and delivering goods to ports that need them. Or players can play more like a pirate and attack nation ships and merchant tokens. Or perhaps players start off playing like a merchant and turn to piracy midgame. Players even have opportunities to be pardon for their crimes of piracy to return to a merchant lifestyle of play.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Similo: The Lord of the Rings – Promo Cards
description:
Promo cards at Spiel '23.

Add The One Ring, the artifact which can rule over all other Rings of Power, and Eye of Sauron, the terrifying manifestation of Sauron’s spirit, to all your Similo games!

Discover the jungle and find rare flowers. But mind those who contain an well hidden animal.
Who will find the most correct cards and gathers those in his basket?

In this game, players will go through their deck of 20 cards, to find a certain flower and gather those in their basket. The player who finishes first, ends the round and the other player need to stop - even though, they are not through their entire deck.

The player who found the most cards with that flower, wins the round - as long, as you do not have a wrong card in your basket.

From the second round on, you will search another flower and add an animal, which must not be on the cards.

The first player to win two rounds, will win the game.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Erkundet die Tiefen des Dschungels, um die seltensten Pflanzen zu finden. Aber Vorsicht! Haltet euch unbedingt von den Tieren fern, die sich im Dickicht verstecken. Wer sammelt die meisten Pflanzen, ohne die Tiere zu stören?

Ein Wimmelbild-Spiel voller Fallen: Im Kinderspiel Gewimmel im Dschungel begebt ihr euch auf eine 20-minütige Dschungeltour, um die Tier- und Pflanzenwelt im Dickicht zu entdecken. Hierbei ist Eile geboten, denn ihr alle deckt gleichzeitig die Karten eures Dschungelstapels auf und versucht blitzschnell zu erkennen, ob sich die von den Aufgaben geforderten Tiere und Pflanzen darauf verstecken. Wer am schnellsten die richtigen Pflanzen sammelt und die Tiere dabei nicht stört, gewinnt!

Gewimmel im Dschungel bringt rasanten Spielspaß auf den Tisch, der euch immer wieder neue Herausforderungen bietet. Bei einer Partie bleibt es nie!

—description from the publisher

Ancient Knowledge Con & Trade Promo 2023

3 new monuments and one artifact. All 4 of them are shuffled into the the standard deck.

Exclusive Promo for Spiel Essen 2023

In Black Stories the players try to reconstruct the crime by asking, guessing and fiddling about. A card game just right for any party.

One player, the Chief, takes one of the cards and reads it secretly. The front of the card has the mystery, the back the solution. Then the player reads the front of the card to the other players and shows them the illustration. The other players are the detectives. Singly and together, they try to solve the mystery by asking the Chief questions. But the Chief can only answer Yes, No, Close, or Not Relevant.

In Black Stories the players try to reconstruct the crime by asking, guessing and fiddling about. A card game just right for any party.

One player, the Chief, takes one of the cards and reads it secretly. The front of the card has the mystery, the back the solution. Then the player reads the front of the card to the other players and shows them the illustration. The other players are the detectives. Singly and together, they try to solve the mystery by asking the Chief questions. But the Chief can only answer Yes, No, Close, or Not Relevant.

In Black Stories Junior the players try to reconstruct the crime by asking, guessing and fiddling about. A card game just right for any party.

One player, the Chief, takes one of the cards and reads it secretly. The front of the card has the mystery, the back the solution. Then the player reads the front of the card to the other players and shows them the illustration. The other players are the detectives. Get ready to be Unchained!

An Unchained deck is generated with almost none of the normal rules and balancing of a KeyForge deck, and features a much higher ratio of legacy and maverick cards!

The Unchained deck concept harkens back to the earliest days of KeyForge development by Richard Garfield, who originally proposed that every deck be generated as randomly and free as possible. The Unchained decks will give players a flavor of what might have been!

Warning: Unchained decks bring no promises of balance, no semblance of order, only over-the-top unchained KeyForge fun! Unchained decks are not allowed in official KeyForge tournaments.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Masters of the Universe: Battleground – She-Ra with Swift Wind
description:
Even the mightiest heroes require a loyal ally by their side. 
And what better companion could there be than a majestic steed?
She-Ra, riding upon Swiftwind – a magnificent winged unicorn that flies fearlessly above the battlefields of Eternia. United, they form an indomitable duo, an unstoppable force that ensures justice prevails over every wicked adversary.

—description from the publisher

Bonus tile that you can ask & get for free at Spiel '23 in Essen.

Special rule for this tile: the first person to have offspring in their zoo takes the Stork from the middle of the table and places it next to their zoo in front of them. As soon as another person has offspring in their zoo, the Stork must be passed on to that person.
At the end of the game, it is worth 1 additional plus point for the person who has the Stork in front of them.

Get ready to play hide and seek with monsters — but they won't just stay where they were. They will appear here and there in the blink of an eye, so you might need to use candies to attract them and catch them!

Monster Hide and Seek is a memory game that uses double-sided monster cards to trick your memory. On your turn, flip any two monster cards. If the flip sides match, you win the cards. If they don't, simply put them down WITHOUT flipping them back. Do you remember what's on the other side of these two cards? Don't let your memory fail you!

Combine the BODY, ARM, and LEG parts to create your own mech

Game Overview
Players combine different parts of their abilities to create a mech and fight the opponent's mech on the field map. Break your opponent's mech or press the center of the field to move the container forward. The player first to reach the container in the opponent wins. Analogue game loaded with personalization elements of robot that boys love from kids to adults. Set Contents: Mech parts (1 each of 18 types), cards (43 pieces), field map (1 piece), container (2 pieces), damage counters (6 pieces), rule book (1 piece), instruction manual

Published in issue #347 of Slingshot magazine, Mead-Price is a very simple set of early medieval battle rules for miniatures.

Each army consists of one Warlord, two lesser Leaders, and 6-12 Units, divided into Hearth Guard, Warriors, Mounted Warriors and Skirmishers.

Share in the excitement of Commanding a small vessel as you patrol the Seas in enemy controlled waters. All you need are some small scale miniature ships, two dlOs and you are ready to chart a new course to danger and thrills.

Coastal Command is a challenging set of miniatures rules that can be used to recreate small vessel engagements from 
WW II, or you can design your own 
scenarios.

—description from the designer

Stellar Hop: An Epic Cosmic Adventure

Welcome to Stellar Hop, a captivating board game that transports you to an immersive sci-fi universe. Strategy, sci-fi, exploration, resource management and diplomacy all in one! In this dynamic game, players step into the roles of cosmic commanders, each piloting a unique spaceship. Their mission? To establish supremacy in the vast expanse of the galaxy through exploration, strategic battles, resource management, and diplomacy.

Gameplay:

On their turn, players can move their spaceship across the galaxy, landing on cosmic phenomena tiles.
These tiles offer opportunities to collect 15 unique resources, development cards, and engage in diplomatic negotiations.
Epic space battles, both against rivals and cosmic threats, test players' tactical skills and may involve special abilities and development cards.

Victory Conditions:
The primary path to victory involves accumulating Galaxy Points earned through various actions, such as controlling regions, seizing cosmic phenomena, and achieving development milestones.
Stellar Hop also offers alternative victory conditions, including forging alliances and unlocking cosmic secrets, adding excitement and variety to each game.

Actions:
Move Spaceship
Collect Resources
Engage in Diplomacy
Participate in Battles
Acquire Development Cards
Explore Cosmic Phenomena Tiles

Phases:
Movement Phase
Collect Phase
Diplomacy Phase
Action Phase (Includes Battles, Trades, Diplomacy)
Development Phase

Game End:
The game concludes when a player achieves one of the victory conditions or reaches the required number of Galaxy Points, marking the end of an epic cosmic adventure.

-description from designer

Everybody knows the story... the poor Shoemaker wakes up to find that elves had filled his shop with beautifully crafted footwear and his family is saved from poverty!

However, did you hear about the time the elves went on strike and TROLLS were sent in their place?! It was a disaster and no wonder that the tale was erased from history.

Experience being a team of trolls with a terrible task. Work together in the dead of night to assemble shoes and boots before sunrise. You'll need to plan carefully and communicate in silence to complete the job and avoid being captured by the Shoemaker (who wouldn't want a cobbling troll?!)

Players cooperatively handle cards with limited communication and literal hand management - as soon as a group of cards are placed on the table, it's a shoe! Just hope that it's got all the correct components...

Complete your cobbling contract, earn Troll Bux, improve your cobbling quality - or just try and survive!

—description from the designer

Would you like to fly to the other side of the world? Can’t find suitable routes? Create your own routes and win the card game Let’s Fly. Get to know various passenger aircraft types and the world’s busiest airports, along with their official names and codes.

Pick one of the 4 game objectives and score points, count the  passengers or conquer continents. Each turn decide whether to draw a card from the pile of Aircraft Cards or Airport Cards. Tactically connect the airports using the right aircraft and, together with other players, create route chains in 6 different colours. But be careful, there can only be 1 winner in the end. Will it be you?

—description from the designer

Greetings Galactic Citizens,

This is a solo player game where you take on the role of an Intergalactic Space Trader. You have a freighter which you will use to fly from planet to planet selling your trade goods in the hope of making a profit. You can upgrade your ship, buy bigger ships, make investments and trade goods. Along the way you might do some mining, find a derelict ship, fend off space pirates or head into the entertainment sector. Who knows whom you might meet there.

It is important to understand this game is the following:


     Free (with a pay what you want option, any contributions are appreciated)
     A print and play game
     A solo player game
     Designed for economy printing, with minimal colour
     A portable tabletop game


IST is a game you can play on the move, as you do not have to use dice although a set of polyhedral dice is handy. You can instead, close your eyes and place a pen on a chart and generate a result that way.

Format

IST is designed to be portable, being in an A6 format. Each page is A6 but can be printed A5 also. Using a PDF reader you can set the files to print as booklets if you have A5 paper, and you can always tear in half A4 pages in half. The game was always designed to be carried in a pocket.

—description from the designer
