boardgame: Picture Perfect: Dice Tower Promo Set 2023
description:
Originally available in Pack Archer from Dice Tower 2023 Kickstarter campaign.

Preference Cards: Shuffle the new preference cards with the original game cards and randomly remove 3 before placing cards in the guest envelopes.

Part of a collection of travel games including Hot Shot Basketball and Hot Shot Soccer.  Hot Shot Baseball is similar in the game box and design as the others. You have to remove the parts which are stored underneath like the other games as well.  The parts include; Game unit with storage area, Scoreboard, backstop, home run ramp, 3 plastic baseballs, 3 panel cage, bat, label sheet and instructions.

Set-up is simple and quick.  This can be a two player game with one person doing the pitching and the other doing the batting.  Or pitch and hit with both hands working the game.

The goal is to hit the most runs and you win!
family: Versions & Editions: Travel Versions of Non-Travel Games

boardgame: Ascension Tactics: Miniatures Deckbuilding Game – Voidkin T'valemos Promo Card
description:
Originally available in Pack Archer from Dice Tower 2023 Kickstarter campaign.

Name: Voidkin T'valemos
Cost: 7 Runes
Type: Void Hero
Ambush: Command one of your exhausted Champions for free.
Effect: Command one of your exhausted Champions for free. It has +6 Strength, +1 bonus Speed, and "Slay: Defeat an enemy Champion on the battlefield."

The goal is to be the first to get rid of all your cards, and when there's one card to go, don't forget to yell "UNO!"

UNO WellieWishers comes with a special Kindness card, and when you play it, all your fellow players get to discard one card in the color that you choose!

family: Organizations: Board Games Association of Creators in Spain (LUDO)

description:
You are a competitor in the Mega Knockdown Fighting Tournament, held each year in Greenville, USA. Using attacks, blocks and grappling techniques, you must overcome your opponent in single combat. Predicting your opponent's actions, controlling space and pressing the advantage are your keys to victory.

Play as iconic fighters such as Marinara Marv, M M Lewis, Big Billy, Nick Beardguy and Shotokan Artist Paul, each with their own special moves and abilities inspired by classic 2D fighting games.

—description from the designer

Doom Guard is a cooperative board game for one to five players, who don the mantle of Earth's mightiest heroes and villains as they are forced to work together in order to protect Earth from total annihilation!

Defeat the minions of Cthulhu, fight the spread of corruption, and beat back the forces of evil through 45-60 minute scenarios that can be played individually or as part of a complete campaign.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Guild Academies of Valeria: Promo Quests
description:
A stretch goal reached given to backers of the Shadow Kingdoms of Valeria: Riftlands & Guild Academies of Valeria Kickstarter campaign.

A set of eigth alternate Quest cards that are used to replace the 2nd and 3rd Quest cards in each Guild's Quest stack to provide more variety.

boardgame: Shadow Kingdoms of Valeria: Promo Awards
description:
A stretch goal reached given to backers of the Shadow Kingdoms of Valeria: Riftlands & Guild Academies of Valeria Kickstarter campaign.

A set of four additional Award cards to be added to their respective Award cards deck.

Build genuine bonding moments with Heart-To-Heart Cards. It's a wonderful way to make meaningful connections and break the ice when you don't know the person very well.

Getting to know someone doesn't have to be painful. Instead of talking about the weather and making small talk, you get to discuss things you're passionate about.

What's in the box:
30 x Reflection Cards
30 x Imagination Cards
30 x Memories Cards
22 x Wild Cards
8 x Bind Cards
1 x How To Play Cards

There are 2 ways of playing

i. Quality Time: Let’s Bond!
Choose a player to start & draw a card from the top of the deck.
Read the prompt aloud and answer the question.
If you draw a Wild Card, the prompt must be completed by all players in that round.
If you draw a Bind Card, you get to pick a player to complete the prompt.
The game ends when all cards have been drawn, or when your game time is over.

ii. Party Game: Impress The Judge!
Each player takes a turn becoming The Judge. As The Judge, draw a card from the deck and read the prompt aloud. The rest of the players answers the prompt as best they can. The Judge then decides who gave the best answer, and awards the card to the player. The player who first collects five cards wins the game.

In Arctic Roll, you will lead a tribe of intrepid hunters, heading out across the ice to hunt for fish. Compete over the scarce resources and use your dice to move across the ice and excavate fishing holes.
Draft the right dice to place your hunters strategically in their search for food, to become the winner of Arctic Roll!

—description from the publisher

It's the bottom of the ninth, the bases are loaded, Sally takes the pitcher's mound while Jimmy steps up to plate. Pull back the pitching lever and release to send the metal ball rolling.
Moving with quick reflexes, Jimmy releases the switch on his side to swing the metal bat and send the ball rolling - But where will it go?

Land in the "Single" slot to move the runner peg to 1st base, "Double" to move to 2nd base, "Triple" for 3rd base, or if you're really lucky, you just might land a big Home Run.

But don't get your hopes up too high! Using the baseball lever, Sally shifts her players back and forth to try and block the ball - And if she does...YOU'RE OUT!

Keep playing your way through nine innings, switching places as batter and pitcher and using the dials to keep track of balls, strikes, outs, and points.

The player with the most points wins!

Contents: Baseball stadium, player pieces and billboards from all 30 MLB teams, stands, pitching chute, metal bat, metal balls, foul poles, outfield barriers, scoreboard, base runner markers, ball-strike-and-out marker, sticker sheet, detailed instructions and game rules

Four players embody roles in a mystery crime dinner to solve puzzles, find the culprit among themselves and solve the murder.

Background
"How are you doing right now on a scale of 0 to 10?" - It all started with this question. Weeks have now passed and you are still in the psychiatric clinic Seelenheil in Wahnbüttel. Therapy, colourful pills and talk, talk, talk - that's the motto here. But a gruesome murder shatters your daily routine. The head of the clinic, Dr Vasel, is found dead in her office at the clinic. Why did she have to die? Which one of you is crazy enough to commit murder? Find out who has Dr Vasel on their conscience and try not to lose your mind.

In Merry Christmas players must decorate a Christmas tree.
First, a Christmas tree must be formed on the table using the 'tree' cards.
Then, each player shuffles a set of 0-9 "ball" cards of one colour to form their personal drawing deck. Each turn players can:

     draw a "ball" card from their personal drawing deck OR
     lay 1 or 2 'ball' cards of his colour on the tree, starting from the base, respecting the rule that the laid card must have a value greater than the card it covers.


The first player to reach the top will have the honour of placing the star!

—description from the publisher

(Nie)Powinieneś 3 is a card game for awful adults (18+) who like to laugh. It comes with two decks of cards. It is similar to Cards Against Humanity or and can be explained in two minutes. All players (from 3 to 15 people) draw 10 cards from orange deck at the start and then first main player draws one card from black deck.

Main player read black cards with some funny phrase and other participants have to choose on of their orange cards with other funny phrases that in their opinion are a best match for the phrase in the drawn black card. Cards are given to the main player in secret, whom then reads them aloud and chooses the best one and owner of this card scores the point.

After that all players that used orange cards draws new ones (so they have 10 again) and the next player become the main player and the cycle continues. After one of the decks become empty players stop the game, they count their score (1 black cards = 1 point) and the winner is a player with the higher score.

All cards have phrases printed in english and polish language both.

Decks from (Nie)Powinieneś 3 can be merged with ones from (Nie)Powinieneś and (Nie)Powinieneś 2.

Set within the world of war, War? WAR!! You sit at the head of one of the families within the faction 'Houses Of The Red Mountains'.  You must build the strongest House comprised of Royals and their Entourage whilst being a little sneaky and assassinating, blowing up or being a general pain to the other Houses.

The 38 character card deck is made up of 38 unique character portraits and once it is empty and you cannot draw the round immediately ends.  Each player counts the points in their House, the highest one wins 1 Victory Point.  The first to 3 is overall Monarch and winner of House Of Cards.

With simple pick up and play mechanics, on your turn you will draw 1 card and play 1 card, easy, right?  "You've drawn The Wise Old Empress, nice" Add that card to your House, increasing your points or "You have just drawn the Plague Emperor" throw it over into an opponents House and it will actively slay a Royal in their House.

With three types of characters, Royals will be used to increase your House hold strength by adding points, Entourage stay within your House and can deviously change the flow of power (whilst occasionally costing some points to do so) and then there are the others, general weird and wonderful workers - from Onion Smugglers to Crimson Witches.

-description from publisher

Set within the world of war, War? WAR!!

Become the truest and purest Leech follower by praising the Leech Queen.  Achieve greatness by other Leech Followers calling you a liar, then revealing your true and honest hand.

You are one of the followers within the faction of the United Marshes of Stienk (see war, War? WAR!!).  Your job is to prove your worthness by telling the truth (well, not being found out to be lying) and becoming the Leech Magi.

Based on the card game 'Cheat', players must play to get rid of their cards by playing them face down and calling what they have assumed they have played.  Opponents can then call 'Leech Liar' and expose the cards, hoping to find the wrong number of leeches on the cards.

Start with 6 leech cards, play as many as you think you can get rid of without being called out and then draw back up to 6.

The twist comes in two main areas, the Wild Leech, once exposed it becomes whatever the player called, giving them a 'get out of jail free card' and also allowing some hilariously 'wild' calls.

The second twist is the scoring, with each revealed truth that player turns the cards into a ladder, a ladder to the Leech Queen.  The first to reach 6 steps wins the round and is awarded a Leech Queen card (the first to 3 wins the game and is announced Master Magi of the Queen Leech of the United Marshes of Stienk - that's right the title is that long!).  Though if the reveal is shown to be a lie (the incorrect leeches are exposed), that player not only takes the stack of cards but the exposed leech cards and taken and score steps to the eternal marches, the first player that gets to 6 ends the round and are 'rewarded' a Stienk Marsh Card (you don't want these).

If every player is being a little cautious and cagey the round ends when a player empties cannot draw any cards and empties their hand, at that moment someone might as well call 'Leech Liar!'

A quick, language free card game for up to 6 players that love a little bluffing and are generally a little mischievous.

-description from publisher
Base Abducktion game + Abduction: IntergalacDuck Research Expansion wrapped together in a new box sleeve with almost no information on it.
publishers: Evan and Josh's Very Special Games Company (Very Special Games)

description:
Tokkenspel, the board game with many more options, provides sufficient tension every time. What about the black dot to 'jump over', the use of jokers or the five with which you can put the opponent past the home base. A new game with a new board that will give young and old fun for years to come!

THE OBJECTIVE OF THE GAME
You play Het Tokkenspel in teams of 2 people. The goal is to be the first team to get all your pawns into the home box (the row with 4 colored dots).

PREPARATION
Het Tokkenspel is placed in the center of the table and the pawns are put in place (the colored boxes on the outside of the board).
With 4 people you play with 1 deck of cards (52 pieces) and 2 jokers.
With 6 people you play with 1 ½ decks of cards (78 pieces) and 3 jokers. To do this, take all red or black cards and 1 joker from the extra deck. You decide in advance who starts dealing the cards. The player next to the dealer (clockwise) starts.

COURSE OF THE GAME
You play Tokkenspel with 4 or 6 people (in teams of 2 people).
The order is divided into three rounds

     1st round 5 cards
     2nd round 4 cards
     3rd round 4 cards.


2 (4-person) or 3 cards (6-person) remain. If a joker is played, that player receives one of the extra cards. If the joker cannot be played, the card will not come in play.

—description from the publisher

Clementoni's "O Grande Jogo Quiz" is a fun board game with lots of quizzes to challenge friends and family. Various questions to test yourselves on the world's most extravagant curiosities. With original game mechanics: the other players have to bet on their opponent's answer.

—description from the publisher (translated)

O jogo “O Grande Jogo Quiz” da Clementoni é um divertido jogo de tabuleiro com muitos quizzes para desafiar amigos e familiares. Várias perguntas para se porem à prova sobre as curiosidades mais extravagantes do mundo. Com uma mecânica de jogo original: os outros jogadores deverão apostar na resposta do adversário

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Maid Knight Saga: The Story of Faltisia – Complete Edition
description:
Welcome to the nation of Faltisia—a land blessed with lush vistas, bustling towns, and economic stability. You’re a girl born within the borders of this flourishing domain, and your only dream is to become one of the nation’s coveted Maid Knights—a position essential to the country’s national security.

However, due to the importance of the Maid Knight occupation within Faltisia, only the most elite are allowed into the academy that grants Maid status, and only the best of those go on to graduate and become official Faltisian Maid Knights. Fortunately, you’ve passed the Royal Academy of Faltisia’s entrance exam and now have three years to polish yourself. How will you spend your school life?

The Complete Edition includes the base game, Maid Knight Saga: The Story of Faltisia, the expansion, The Battle for London, and a brand new Solo mode.

Translation by Samuel Allen
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description:
Goal : Capture the opponent's flag.

Gameplay : Each player owns 9 pieces. 
Each piece can make a quarter-turn or move forwards, backwards, left or right, as far as the corresponding weapon allows.
The Flag, Grapnel and Tower move 1 square at a time.
The Bow moves 1 or 2 squares at a time.
The Pistol moves 1, 2 or 3 squares a a time.

A piece is taken when an opposing piece lands in an adjacent square.
The Grapnel is stronger than the Tower and the Flag.
The Tower is stronger than the Bow, Pistol and Flag.
The Bow is stronger than the Grapnel and the Flag.
The Pistol is stronger than the Grapnel, Bow and Flag.

Have an adventure!
Solve the puzzles!
Avoid the traps set!

Escape Quest is a series of unusual book-games. They combine elements of a scripted adventure with tasks such as "escape room".
Experience an amazing adventure in which you are the main character. You make decisions, solve tasks and try to get out of various traps that are set for you.
Alcatraz: Infiltration: 1963, San Francisco Bay. You play the role of an investigative journalist tasked with entering the infamous Alcatraz as a prisoner. An amazing adventure awaits you and the opportunity to learn the darkest secrets of the prison. But remember, there is no reduced fare for you. Can you escape the famous Alcatraz? What decisions will you make? The ending of this story is entirely up to you.

—description from the publisher

Atrapamoscas (Flyswatter) is a skill based single card game for 1 or more players. Each player makes 3 attempts, in which players throw up the card and try catch it. They get points equal to the number of flies they are touching (10 in total) multiplied by the number of fireflies (3) that remain untouched.

The Red card version is the standard layout. The Blue card is of lower difficulty. The Pink card is more unpredictable.


Designed for the BGG 2023 1-card print and play design contest.

boardgame: ハーベスト：収穫祭 (Harvest: Festival)
description:
Today is the annual harvest festival! Harvesting becomes even more important in this mini-expansion!

Players collect harvest pieces during their turns. When harvesting, a player takes one piece of the harvested vegetable. Scoring occurs at the game's end, with players earning 30 points for having the most harvest pieces of each vegetable.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: むずかしくない広辞苑かるた (Dictionary Karuta: Easy Kojien)
description:
There are countless entries in the dictionary. There are many words that you know. Let's find words you have seen!

One person reads the explanation card aloud, and the other person picks up the correct word card. Whoever gets the most wins.

—description from the designer

In Clueless, the goal is to score a perfect A+ report card by being the first to complete a series of mini-games. Based on iconic Clueless moments, it's safe to say the nostalgia is REAL!

Take a trip to the mall in Life or Death, attend the Valley party when answering Party Questions, visit Cher's high school in Debate Class, and even take a look into Cher's iconic closet in Mis-Match. Relive your favorite Clueless moments, answer personal questions, and bond with friends along the way!

Will you be the first to fill out your report card, or will you be posting #ImClueless?

—description from the publisher

Welcome to Dreamspace Ltd, the largest bounty hunter company across any multiverse! Prepare yourselves to navigate the ever-changing and entirely unpredictable multiverse in which we operate. Each planet is likely dissimilar to anything you've ever imagined, a realm where advanced technologies might find themselves intertwined with prehistoric tribes, and where anything can take on different forms—or not. That's the beauty of the multiverse!

Dreamspace: Mission to Marsylvania is a competitive,dungeon crawler, American-style, board game from 2 to 5 players set in the multiverse. You will become a bounty hunter, so-called Dreamspacer, and live an amazing journey throughout Marsylvania! 
Marsylvania is like the Mars planet of the Milky Way, but in this universe, it has been colonized by an ancient human civilization named Nuwa, and it is also suffering from an unknown curse that has turned some of the inhabitants into Werewolves and Vampires. 
Due to the planet's lack of rotation, Marsylvania is divided into three main areas: The Nuwa Desert, The Twilight Jungle, and The Dark Land.

Each Dreamspacer is unique and peculiar (such as a humanoids-giraffe professor of the arcane arts) and it has its hunter stats (health, attack, defense, speed, and mana), job title, planet of origin, special abilities, and starting equip or spell.  
During the game, you will gear up with equipment, Spells, Allies, and powerful Relics. You will face adversities and iconic enemies (such as the Androids police of the multiverse, known as The Alliance), unlock new levels and new abilities, and most importantly have fun competing against your friends!

The actual gameplay is relatively simple, it is structured in turns and each turn is divided in 5 phases: Each turn is divided in 5 phases: 

     Movement Phase
     Square Effect Phase
     Theft and Exchange Phase
     Encounter Phase 
     Recovery Phase


During your turns, you will explore the planet and move throughout its areas until you will be able to reach the Dark Land, the final area where the Vampire Lord is hiding. More closer you are to the Dark Zone, the more hostile the Planet will be toward you! Once you reach this area the Vampire Lord will do its appearance and try to defeat you, so gear up, have luck in rolling, and win!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Neutral Heroes 3
description: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Neutral Heroes 3 contains various iconic characters that were bound for the wall under the watchful eye of a Night's Watch recruiter. It also features the two commanders of the Stormcrows, allowing players to bring their band of mercenaries onto the battlefield.
family: Books: A Song of Ice and Fire
Game: A Song of Ice & Fire – Tabletop Miniatures Game

description:
Sudden Conflict is a two-player miniatures skirmish game where players control teams of unique characters from across a multiverse that lurches on the edge of annihilation. Players battle each other across various battlefields, and can create their own teams using characters from multiple Sudden Conflict sets.

There are three separate core sets that each unveil a distinct reality awaiting exploration. Each core set can be played separately, or combined to give players access to a greater pool of character to specific build teams or to create a drafting experience which challenges players to build teams in a way comparable to building decks in trading card games.

Players engage in intermittent turns, directing one character at a time to influence the dynamics of the battlefield. With each strategic move, you either push your opponent closer to defeat or capitalise on setbacks, accumulating momentum dice. These momentum dice serve as valuable assets, empowering you to shift the tide in your favour in future conflicts.

Each set of Sudden Conflict contains six custom miniatures, six character cards, ten action dice, ten momentum dice, a double-sided battlefield, rulebook and numerous tokens to track various conditions and game states.

CORE SETS 

Sudden Conflict: Valrona presents a dark Renaissance fantasy realm, where a land grapples with the twin challenges of a deadly plague and horrific beasts.

Sudden Conflict: Ukyo invites you to a Far East domain inhabited by anthropomorphic animals, all under the rule of an oppressive government.

Sudden Conflict: Galactic Throne immerses you in a space opera setting, where the omnipotent Galactic Tyrant — Empress Melar — strives to assert dominance across all realities.

EXPANSION SETS

Sudden Conflict: Exiled brings six more characters into the mix. Exiled includes 3 pairs of characters which thematically fit into the worlds of Valrona, Ukyo and Galactic Throne, and may be added or swapped into teams to create unique battles. Sudden Conflict: Exiled is not playable without one or more Core Sets.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: 政宗独眼竜：戦国合戦ゲーム (Date Sengoku Warlord Game)
description:
Date Sengoku Warlord is the same game as Sengoku Warlord, but with the theme of Date Masamune, a noted Daimyo from the Yonezawa area of Japan, nicknamed the "One-Eyed Dragon" due to his right eye being cut out due to a childhood disease.

Date conquered all of Mutsu, and was a rival to Hideyoshi, but he humbled himself and pledged himself to the Taiko in 1590.  He later went on to serve the Tokugawa and fought against his former master during the Sekigahara campaign in 1600 and again at Osaka in 1614-15.  He died in 1636.

The game has all the same components as the Sengoku Warlord Game but has different artwork.

—user summary

A game of history, trivia, and fun, players take turns rolling and then moving up and down Maine's coastline from Calais, ME to Isles of Shoals, NH. Along the way players must collect cards at each lighthouse and avoid blue penalty squares. Players will also have the opportunity to answer lighthouse trivia questions at each lighthouse they visit. Correct answers gain valuable points. The game ends when one player has landed on all of the lighthouses or when all players agree to end the game.

In Trench Tactics, players step into the gritty, strategic world of World War I. This roll-and-write solitaire board game plunges you into the chaos of no man's land. As the commander, your goal is to maneuver your units across the treacherous battlefield, navigating obstacles and enemy fire to reach and conquer the opposing trench while eliminating all enemy units. Choose your tactics wisely.

Gameplay revolves around strategic dice allocation. Each turn, the player rolls the Command dice and assigns them to actions: Advance, Artillery and Reserves. Every choice is crucial as you balance offense, defense, and maneuverability.

—description from the designer

The players take turns to roll and move. On some spaces events hinder or benefit the players. The first to reach space 100 wins the game.

The players take turns to roll and move. On their way they get to shoot animals and gets points awarded according to the kind of animal they shot. When all players have completed their track, the player with the most points wins the game.

You are a king of a small kingdom, but you want to expand it, you want everything.
Your goal is to conquer the whole map, but you have a rival.

This 2-player print-and-play game offers lots of fun.
Build catapults, train knights, move them across the map and attack oponent's cities. It uses grid movement mechanics and simple combat mechanics.

You can win by taking all of the oponent's cities.

Unique and exciting game with special cups to shoot ping pong balls.
Develop skills in aiming and shooting the cups to collect as many points as possible.
Requires dexterity and coordination.
Contains coasters as extra bats for more playing options and points.
Great activity for enjoyable evenings with friends and family, full of surprises.

Chat Noir is a card game that takes its root in the traditional, 4 suites - 52 playing cards game. It's a 2 to 4 players game, but can be played with more people by adding another deck. The same rules apply weather an additional deck is used or not.

It features illustrations in a vintage style, in the following themes: Clover features symbols of luck, Hearts features romantic imageries, Diamonds features symbols of bad luck, and Spades features only black cats in various decors.

Players choose a secret "lucky" card from their starting hand, and then they take turns drawing a card, and playing combinations from cards of their hand, if they can, and want, to score points. Any player can capture others' combos with Spades cards (Black cats) and steal the points.

Each player grows their own pile of "won" cards from combinations they played or captured until the game ends, when the draw pile empties. Players reveal their "lucky" card and score additional points that can totally reverse the outcome of the game. The player with the highest final score wins.

Tridio C is a cooperative game in which players must work together to solve tough spatial puzzles. All players sit around the game board. By mutual agreement, they will place a number of cubes in a certain arrangement in the middle of the board. Each player receives an assignment card with which he can provide part of the solution. With this card he can find out what the view from his side should look like. One by one, a player places a new cube and must consult with the other players for the final position. If the players have found the cube arrangement that matches all the cards within the agreed time, then all players have won. Tridio C is a unique, beautifully executed game and comes with a clear manual. Tridio C is also a perfect game for highly gifted people and for management training

New Pursuits features objectives for the Octopus and the Shark to complete throughout the game.
Only the first player to complete these goals will receive a powerful boost.

The expansion is Kickstarter exclusive.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Kelp: Brilliant Behaviours Mini Expansion Set
description:
Dive even deeper into the world of Kelp! A set of 6 mini-expansions adding new strategies, shenanigans and tons of replayability. 
They can be mixed and matched or even stacked. Change the board. Ride a jellyfish. Feel the thrill.

The Brilliant Behaviours Set consists of 6 different Mini Expansions:


    The Jellyfish - Ride a Jellyfish and let it steal energy from the Shark.
    The Zones - Now it's your turn as the Shark to manipulate the board. Obstruct the plans of the Octopus, but raise the stakes for yourself in return.
    The Coconut - Hide the Octopus under a coconut, and make it harder to attack! Or don't... and stick the coconut on a shell to confuse the Shark!
    The Dens - Visit your dens to collect powered-up growth tiles.
    The Urchins - Place spiky Urchins on the board.
    The Reflexes - Upgrade your Shark with powerful dice from a new growth tile.

boardgame: The Adventures of Robin Hood: Variant for Experienced Players
description:
Originally available in Pack Archer from Dice Tower 2023 Kickstarter campaign.

Variant for experienced players (Use these rules from Chapter 2 on)

1. Brave Enemies: If a player is prompted to place 6 purple cubes and 1 white cube into the bag when preparing a chapter, add 6 additional purple cubes to the bag. You will do this once for the whole group, regardless of the number of players

2. Wild Guards: Place a red cube on seal 4. If a seal is placed here, it will be activated and then placed back into the bag with all the previously drawn seals. Exception: The seals that show the octagonal symbol of the carriages will not be returned to the bag and will stay in the board.

3. Short On Time: When preparing a chapter, always put one less hourglass than is indicated in the book on the Bad End. Exception: Do not use this rule for the adventures "A Touch Decision" and "The Oath of the 13".

Subject 5U-21: Cards #1–5 consist of a brand new investigator and her signature cards. The rules for using this investigator can be found starting on page 3.

New Event Organizer Rules: All 9 copies of card #10, along with the new rules starting on page 21, can be used to expand the role of the event organizer when playing The Blob That Ate Everything in Epic Multiplayer Mode.

description:
Hello and welcome to Avalanche Card Game, the ultimate skiing card game! Easy to learn and quick to play, Avalanche Card Game brings the excitement of the slopes right to your fingertips. Whether you're a seasoned skier or a winter sports enthusiast, Avalanche Card Game offers a thrilling Alpine adventure for all ages. Discover the thrill of navigating the mountains, mastering your strategy, and outsmarting your fellow skiers.

Collect points by skilfully connecting ski runs to outpace your fellow skiers and snowboarders. However, be wary of potential Avalanches and other challenges that await you on the slopes. A game of strategy and courage, may the best skier win!

—description from the publisher

A double-sided game board presenting two new maps for Terraforming Mars, each with new milestones and awards:


     Amazonis Planitia - An expanded board with 30 additional hex spaces on Mars, 2 extra ocean tiles and longer terraforming tracks to support massive 5 player games.
     Vastitas Borealis - Terraform the northern waste of Mars.

Dragon Lords is a fantasy wargame where the players are each trying to win the country back from the power of the dragons.

—user summary

A rich, fertile country stretches between mountain ranges and a warm sea. In the river valleys, cities grew rich, meadows turned green, wheat fields filled with gold. Among the snow-capped peaks, proud clan warriors guarded gem mines. But 
once…

Dragons, embodied by the elements, descended on the country. There was no escape from their cunning and cruelty either in the cities, or in the forests, or among the rocks. Thousands of people died, the smoke of hundreds of fires smoked the sky, and in the wake of the atrocities followed the masters of the elements, the Lords of the Dragons.

And the country burst into flames, set on fire from four fronts. Cities are surrounded by rows of walls, destitute villagers and stern mountaineers take up arms, obeying the power of the Dragon Lords. Thousands of convicts bend their backs in the mines, driving rivers of gold and stones into the treasury of their Lord. Lines of iron-clad warriors are marching towards the enemy.

The four Dragon Lords are preparing for mortal combat, and the shadows of the four Dragon Towers loom over the once peaceful nations.

And the skies now completely belong to the Dragons. These formidable, ferocious creatures of incomprehensible magic, 
for which there are no barriers, faithfully serve the Lords, destroying everything that stands in their way...

The game is played for six turns, each of four phases of five steps each.  The steps are:


     Alteration
     Change
     Enrichment
     Development
     Advancement


The game has six unit types: Dragons, horsemen, warriors, highlanders, archers, and militiamen, each with their own costs and abilities.  With these you conquer and wage war.

The winner is the first to defeat all the other rivals and rule the land.

—description from the rulebook

description: New command units rules, weapons, missions, and even a new tile in White Dwarf #115. Also contained are counters for crack grenades and plasma grenades, as well as a new mission: Delaying Action.
A science fiction games were players build up their spaceships and stations in order to control the central star system at the end of the tenth round.

Combat Robots 2 is a game of Mech-to-Mech combat in the future, much like Battletech.  The game includes:

2 playing maps
8 buildable robot figures with 8 stands
8 tech sheets
40 damage chips
4 memos
dice
game rules

The map is divided into hexes of a terrain type, each with different penalties and advantages for combat. Players maneuver on the map and try to get advantage over their opponents and destroy their mechs before theirs is destroyed.

During a turn a player performs an action with each robot. 
It can move, fire, or attempts to repair. After a player has completed, then the other side does the same.  This constitutes a turn.

Mechs have different stats, with some having benefits that others do not.  Weapons have different ranges and arcs of fire. A mech must have line of sight in order to fire at a target.  Fire is resolved with a die roll.

—user summary

Reality and its two faces are intertwined in Territorium, the material plane and the other side are connected by a mysterious tunnel, located in the temple that demarcates the borders of the four lands that make up Territorium.
For eons, two powerful entities, the Phoenix and the Dragon, capable of passing through the tunnel, have maintained the balance between both planes, using the power of ancient magical gems.

The inhabitants of the four lands, inspired by the cult of the Dragon and the Phoenix, created two antagonistic clans. Both factions coexist in a tense calm.

The appearance of an extradimensional entity thirsty for fun, brought with it a great whirlwind, causing the great fracture, which relegated the Dragon and the Phoenix out of the material plane, breaking the balance of Territorium forever.
Without their leaders, the two clans engage in a bloody conflict for control of Territorium.

The war is here, choose your warriors, you are the leader of the clan. Carefully build your strategy to achieve Territorium dominance.

Four brave warriors who break borders, four gems under your control, opening the tunnel that will bring your exiled master from the other side, guarantee your dominance over Territorium.

—description from the designer

In Find Divided Family you have to find family members they got lost in the Korean war. Each person has different characteristics based on which the characters had to be found as quickly as possible.

There is a display with 50 cards on the table. To start a searching card is revealed. Whoever is the quickest to find the matching person card receives the searching card. the first player how has five searching cards wins the game.

In Две крепости ("Two Fortresses"), both sides are trying to prevent the other side from completing their fortress.

They do this by advancing their forces to attack the walls, but at the same time they build and protect the ones they have. Income is required to build armies and improvements to the walls.

The game is played in turns.  During each turn a player does the following:


    receive income
    raise troops
    movement
    combat
    construction


Combat is resolved by determining the strength of the attack versus the defense value of the armies and wall.  Both sides can modify this by playing a card.  Finally, both roll a die and compare the scores, with the loser losing the difference between the values. Sometimes this means destruction of the wall.

The first player to construct a fortress on the border of their capital, wins the game.

—user summary

description:
Taiwan is an island rich in culture and abundant with native foods. Making a rice ball is easy. Let's see how many different combinations of the flavours you can roll out, and if they are all delicious!

One player roll the dice. The other player have to find the cards they are matching with the symbols of the dice. The fastetst player get's the cards. The player with the mosts cards win the game.

I don’t remember the exact year it happened. It wouldn’t matter anyway. Time is not the same… it’s more like a location to be entered into a GPS than a definite moment. Project Infinity was created by the United Nations of Time to send us to these locations to bring back artifacts from the past. Specific precious gems, minerals, metals are all needed for the Gate to function. These artifacts have a life force of their own. Some energy the science guys get excited about. I don’t know how it works and I don’t care. We go in, we do what we need to do, and we get out. If we are lucky, we get a few days rack time and then reload in the armory with some new Stun Weapons. The rules of engagement are simple - We don’t kill or injure; we don’t leave anything or anyone behind. The UNT Infinity Infantry is the official name we are given but everyone calls us Time Troopers.

We aren’t the only ones with access to a Kobe-Nakamoto Gate. There is a faction out there who are looking for the same artifacts. The Scorpions. Mercenaries of power-hungry conglomerate groups set on destroying our way of life. Politics is not my thing, but I know enough that grabbing the artifacts first and getting them to the UNT we can starve these groups of life force material needed to run their gate. Of course, they can do the same to us if we fail. The last functioning Gate will have full control of time. We must fight for the future - in the past.

Time Troopers is a  solo deck management campaign. Build a squad to travel back in time to find artifacts needed to save humanities future. Battle armies of past civilizations and sneak into ancient monuments. Manage Time as a resource and make choices which define the future timeline in this immersive solo campaign game.

—description from the publisher

Sangonera is a card game that collects the most Valencian expressions from the hand of the most representative characters of each town and Mediterranean gastronomy.

Fill your bar with customers before your opponents to win the game. Cook them the best menus and attack the competition with the action cards full of the best known expressions.

description: Welcome to the game that will take you through the exciting world of animal care. Create the best zoo and charge for visits to win. If you manage to have babies, you will earn more, but be careful with poachers, traps, predators or the feared coronavirus, which will delay you or you will lose what you have earned.

A simple storytelling card game that's the size of a deck of cards.  The gameplay is simple - someone selects a story prompt and everyone in the group shares a story based on that prompt.  An example of a prompt is "your worst birthday."  After everyone has shared, the person who drew the card awards it to the story they enjoyed the most.

First person to win 3 story prompt cards wins the game.

boardgame: Don't Go In There: Ouija Board Promo Pack
description:
Originally available in Pack Cleric from Dice Tower 2023 Kickstarter campaign.

A new set of Cursed Cards for the 2023 Dice Tower annual Kickstarter fundraiser.
