In this exclusive, deluxe edition you will find the entire content of both Kings and Lords of Middle-earth, upgraded to match the quality of our previous limited edition releases:

A beautiful box, with double lid and magnetic opening, hot-foil printed and embossed, to match the size and style of the War of the Ring Anniversary Release and Warriors of Middle-earth Limited Edition.

- Hand-painted miniatures – including the painted version of the Treebeard promo and three versions of each of the Free People sovereigns (starting, Awakened, Corrupted) with a specific color scheme – for a total of 18 figures in Kings, 8 figures in Lords, and Treebeard.

- Two separate perfect-bound rulebooks, one for Kings and one for Lords, with textured covers and special paper.

- Overlays and tiles in both standard and deluxe size (compatible with the Deluxe Game Mat or with the larger game board included in Collector’s Edition and Anniversary Release).

- A special version of the mini-expansion The Fate of Erebor, with overlay tiles suitable for use with the normal game board, Deluxe Game Mat, and Anniversary/Collector’s Edition game board.

- The promo card set The Seeing-stones.

- Numbered authenticity certificate.

Lords of Middle-earth, the first expansion for the War of the Ring Second Edition board game, allows players to explore new possibilities and create fresh gaming opportunities and new strategies.

Important personalities, previously featured in the game only through Event Cards, are represented by specific figures and rules.

New Characters include Elrond, Galadriel, Sméagol, Gothmog and the powerful Balrog of Moria, as well as alternate versions of Gandalf, the Witch-king and the Mouth of Sauron.

New special Action Dice are included: Elven Ring Keepers dice for the Free Peoples player and Lesser Minion dice for the Shadow player.

New versions of all the Companions of the Fellowship of the Ring are also included, to use with the optional “Council of Rivendell” rules.

As an added bonus, figures for Aragorn and Gandalf the White are provided, accessories to the game that all true fans want to add to their copy of War of the Ring!

Kings of Middle–Earth, the new expansion for War of the RingSecond Edition, introduces Sovereigns and Dark Chieftains. These two new types of Characters represent important personalities of Middle-earth with a vital role in the War of the Ring.

The Sovereigns of the Free Peoples were targeted by Sauron’s attempts to bend the will of the peoples opposing him — using the palantíri (the seeing stones), through emissaries, like Gríma, and possibly with other subtle and deceitful means. At the same time, it was crucial for the morale of the Free Peoples to rally around these charismatic figures — Brand, Dáin Ironfoot, Denethor, Théoden, and Thranduil — to fight against the Shadow.

The new rules, miniatures, cards, and Action dice included in this expansion will allow the players to fully develop this conflict and represent the role of these characters in your War of the Ring game.

This expansion also adds three new Characters, the Dark Chieftains, to the Shadow hosts. Unlike the Ringwraiths, who were fully controlled by the Rings of Power, these powerful leaders of the Shadow Armies had distinct personalities, but ultimately all were subject to the commands of Sauron or Saruman. One Dark Chieftain is included for each of the three Shadow Nations — the Black Serpent, the Shadow of Mirkwood, and Uglúk.

Includes Hunt tiles and Stronghold tiles suitable for use with both the standard edition and limited editions of War of the Ring, as well as for use with the War of the Ring Deluxe Game Mat.

These two expansions can be played together or independently.

This Limited Edition of Kings & Lords of Middle-earth  has a total print run of 2000 copies.

CONTENTS OF THE BOX
1 Rulebook (Lords)
8 Plastic Painted Figures (Lords)
5 Special Action Dice (Lords)
11 Cardboard Counters (Lords)
28 Event and Character Cards (Lords)
2 Reference Sheets (Lords)
1 Deluxe Treebeard Promo
1 Rulebook (Kings)
13 Plastic Painted Figures (Kings)
5 Corrupted Sovereign Rings (Kings)
2 Special Action Dice (Kings)
13 Character Cards (Kings)
19 Event Cards (Kings)
1 Sovereign Corruption Board (Kings)
14 Cardboard Counters (Kings)
2 Reference Sheets (Kings)
1 The Seeing-stones Promo
1 The Fate of Erebor Special Version

THIS IS NOT A COMPLETE GAME.
A copy of War of the Ring – Second Edition  (Anniversary Release or normal version) or of the War of the Ring Collector’s Edition is required to play.

-description from publisher's website
family: Series: War of the Ring (Nexus/Ares Games)

description:
4 games in 1!

Contains 1 deck with 33 playing cards, the perfect size for the little ones' hands.


     To win in the Snap Game you have to be quick and say "SNAP" as soon as you see two identical cards.
     In the Family Game you have to collect as many sets or families as possible.
     In the Action Game you will have to get rid of your cards following the same suit, number or symbol as the card in the central deck.
     And in the Couples Game, who will identify more couples with the help of their memory?


It includes game rules in 14 different languages. 
Videos and instructions are available for download online.

Fablefall is an Asymmetric Euro War Game with inspirations from Root and Rising Sun. Within the game, Forces (Order, Industry, Myth, and Rebellion) vie for control of the narrative by gaining victory points called Fable Points.

As you recruit soldiers, invade and defend territories, and battle opponents, you must also learn to achieve objectives that influence certain narrative arenas -  the lore of your exploits, the art produced concerning your deeds, and the people’s respect for your actions. All of these give you points each round and whoever has the most points at the end, wins the game. Excel at determining the Fables told of you and your deeds, and you’ve controlled not just a region on a map, but the hearts and minds of its people. Wars will either see the combatants' efforts forgotten to time, or cemented in stories.

The Xyrians are independent faction that brings a whole new dimension to your gameplay, blending unpredictability with strategic depth.  Xyrians are creatures that resemble octopuses, and they have an advanced blending technology that lets them hide in plain view. This is why, during the game with Xyrian, you will be adding their Tokens - but you can never be sure whether this is only an old trace or an actual Xyrian until you step into this room and investigate. Or some random Primeblood may do that for you. They operate independently, creating dynamic scenarios that can shift the tide of your mission. What is more, you will be able to use this new race together with all the other races from Retaliation! Xyrians are the third additional party to the whole situation happening in Retaliation. Sometimes, they might be your unpredicted ally, sometimes your worst enemy. This mysterious, technologically advanced race has its own goals that will create a lot of exciting situations. With the Xyrians in play, exploring the depths of the unknown facility becomes even more intriguing. Each step into the unknown carries new possibilities and dangers. Not that it was easy and predictable before, but with this new breed, it's like the merrier, the more challenging!

With this race a series of unique serious wounds are introduced! They will not only deal "standard" damage but also perform unique attacks. Imagine being caught in a Xyrian net, losing precious time as you struggle to free yourself, being poisoned with an unknown substance that makes you weaker for a few rounds, or gaining a special marker that will cause all Xyrians to slowly but consequently hunt your Marine. These events definitely add new challenges and some extra narrative depth to your Retaliation missions.

Also, you must be aware that successfully defeating a Xyrian is a rare and challenging feat. But those who manage it are rewarded with exceptionally rare artifacts (i.e., Weapons, Armor, or some precious Items), adding a tantalizing incentive to engage with this new threat. You know the saying – high risk, high reward.

They introduce some strategic manipulation to the game! There are possible conflicts between the Xyrians and other alien races, which can be used to your advantage. So, it is likely that the Xyrians will eliminate as many Primebloods as possible. Their goals will be different with every game. They might aim to infiltrate the Nest, target the most wounded player, or try to hunt down the Queen. Generally, each encounter with the Xyrians feels fresh and challenging and will bring some twists to your game!

—description from the Gamefound campaign

boardgame: Fib: A Game for Liars and Thieves
description:
Fib: Dive into the ultimate party card game where lying, stealing, and catching culprits is the name of the game! Bluff your way to the top, or become the detective everyone fears.

Setup & Storytelling

     Deal five cards to each player and determine the starting Storyteller.
     Choose three cards, sequence them on the Storyboard, and tell a story, improvising where needed.


Listening & Accusing

     Call "Pass" if you believe the story or "Fib" to accuse a card of falsehood.
     Gain points for successful Fib identification or defending against false accusations.


The Aftermath

     Continue passing the Storyboard and playing rounds.
     First to ELEVEN points wins, or end early with the highest points as the winner.


—description from the designer

boardgame: 王×錬金研究所 (King x Alchemy Institute)
description:
You are in a royal Alchemy Laboratory in the kingdom. One day the king said that “cutting unnecessary expenses for facilities at a time when finances are under pressure” and in the Alchemy Institute, they have to decided to lay off people.

King x Alchemy Institute is a trick-taking game where you have to collect the materials  Win tricks and make combos using cards obtained from tricks and create a high score with alchemical synthesis.
designers: ヨシイケ　シンイチ (Yoshike Shinichi)

description: A single-scenario promo that was available during The Dice Tower's 2023 Kickstarter campaign.

The game line "My Super Tank" is 12 mini-boxes in a colorful shopping box. Each box contains a set of parts for assembling a mini-model, a game card, simple rules and instructions for coloring. All models are assembled without glue.

Even though all tanks are different, their parts are interchangeable. This allows you to combine parts of different sets and assemble a super machine for victorious tabletop battles.

If desired, the models can be painted. The attached instructions will teach you this. In addition, the tanks are made on the scale of the popular Z.O.D. game system, and, thanks to the Army list in each set, they can strengthen the planetary armies of this game world.

—description from the publisher

Clika! is a boardgame focused on observation, memmory and speed, specially suited for playing with the family. Designed in order to play, learn and laugh.

A card will be flipped each turn with a limited information of a member of "La Clika". You'll have to be the fastest and cover the appropriate member with your hand. The fastest will earn the card. At the end of the game, the player with most cards is the winner.

But it's not that easy. Member cards will be progressively turned face down and you'll need to remember its position and information.

Clika! is a part of the sociomusical educational project "La Clika" and created by "La Juganera" and "Xarxa de Cases de la Música".

boardgame: The Infection: Roll, Write and Fight
description:
The Infection: Roll, Write, and Fight is a print-and-play game that allows you to embark on a strategic puzzle-solving journey. Become a Survivor, navigating various locations in a desolate world. Explore each location with boots-on-the-ground action, gather resources, and confront the Turned in this simple yet challenging Roll & Write game.

The Survivor gathers Food, Fuel, and Search resources to facilitate movement across the map and acquire various items for critical situations. Exchange resources if needed for different ones. With a randomized roll to choose Enemy and setup, no game will be the same.

Survivors and Enemies are represented with dice and activated based on the pip number, from 1-6. Take actions such as using items, picking up resources, walking, and breaking obstacles. Each enemy has its own weaknesses, with specific weapons required for their defeat. Defeating three enemies improves your Survivor's actions, increasing your chances of survival. Reach one of your set goals to beat the game.

But be careful, as running out of resources results in immediate defeat.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Reign Absolute: Umbrous Edition – Death & Disorder Expansion Pack
description:
Bearing four destructive Factions and Battlefield modifier rules, Reign Absolute: Umbrous Edition Death & Disorder Expansion Pack brings the harbingers of evil to Reign Absolute: Umbrous Edition, the grid based conquest game where each player has an unique set of Faction units, and the objective is to locate and defeat the opponent's Faction unit, at which point that player is eradicated from the game.

Reign Absolute: Umbrous Edition Death & Disorder Expansion Pack contains 

     4 complete new Factions: Undead, Demons, Raiders and Ratlings
     12 Battlespacer cards to modify the playing grid for more fun and action


—description from the publisher

Salvem els Aiguamolls is a solo boardgame that recreates, in abstract way, the campaign to save the wetlands of Alt Empordà (Catalonia), which took place between 1973 and 1984.

The goal is to manage the campaign in the best way possible, striving to achieve, at the very least, historical success.

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Zipa is a 1v1 sci-fi card game where players select a pre-constructed Faction Deck then build a fully customizable Discovery Deck (powerful reward cards you receive as the game progresses) from their collection.

Featuring over 100 Discovery cards to choose from and 6 Faction Decks, Zipa allows players to express themselves through deck construction and strategy!

Race to be the first player to gather enough Energy to become a galactic superpower; or seek victory through interstellar Conquest, the choice is yours!

—description from the designer

A 2 person card game where players race to win the title of Marathon, the fastest messenger in Greece.

Marathon is a quick hand-management racing game. Players utilize travel cards that match upcoming terrain to move forward, and special action cards to assist them in their quest, or thwart their opponent.

boardgame: 姫とドラゴン人狼 (Hime to Dragon Jinro)
description:
姫とドラゴン人狼 (Hime to Dragon Jinro) is a Werewolf game from Japan, designed to be as small, quick and portable. Playable in 5 minutes without somebody to run the game.

A princess from the land of the wolf fairies has a great adventure across the Lake of Dragons!

A werewolf princess (werewolf) and her grandfather (madman), longing for the outside world, escape from their castle. But the lake surrounding the castle is crawling with dragons on guard. Moreover, the king has ordered a fortune-teller to find out where the princess is in the lake of dragons.

In a panic, the princess and her grandfather disguise themselves as dragons and hide in the lake.

In this visually pleasing werewolf game, the princess player crosses the hands of the players who are represented by the backs of dragons at the beginning of the game, and the discussion begins based on this.

GM要らずの５分間人狼です。

おおかみ妖精の国のお姫様が、ドラゴンの湖を渡って大冒険！

外の世界に憧れるおおかみ姫（人狼）とじいや（狂人）がお城を抜け出します。でもお城をかこむ湖には見張りのドラゴンがうようよ。しかも王様は占い師に命じて姫の居場所がドラゴンの湖と探り当てたもよう。

あわてた姫とじいやは、ドラゴンに化けて湖に隠れます。

ゲームの最初に姫のプレイヤーがドラゴンの背中に見立てたプレイヤー達の手を渡り、それをもとに議論が始まるというはた目にも楽しい人狼です。
--description by publisher

The Squad, the gamebook, offers a captivating single-player gaming experience, inviting you to immerse yourself in the tactical world of a (fictitious) elite police team. Play as one or more members of this specialized unit's Operators, also called "OPS". Their mission: to confront the hostile hordes threatening the city. Each OPS is crucial, providing specific skills necessary for the team to progress. Strategic collaboration between them is essential to succeed in the varied missions that arise. The game passively handles the management of enemies and events that this elite team faces.

The Squad is much more than just a book, it is a complete board game. Dice and tactics play a central role in this immersive adventure. Everything you need, except the 6-sided dice, is included in the book: game rules, tokens and ready-to-cut cards.

The game evolves within a campaign, retracing the assaults of this elite police team.

Stay focused, sharpen your senses, complete your missions, and above all, learn to master your skills, weapons and equipment!

—description from the designer

さかさま人狼 (Sakasama Jinrou) is an upside-down Werewolf game from Japan.

By turning the idea of the normal wargame upside down, a new game has been created! Players are wolves, not humans. Suspension by vote is gone, and the wolves attack. Werewolf attacks are also the cornerstone of human positions in upside-down werewolves. The hunter shoots wolves every night.

The game itself is almost the same as normal Werewolf. The only difference is the position. The Hunter is the key to the human role in Werewolf, and he shoots wolves every night.

通常の人狼ゲームの発想をさかさまにすることで、新しいゲームが生まれてしまいました！
プレイヤーは人間ではなく、狼です。
投票による吊りはなくなり、狼たちの襲撃になります。
また、人狼の襲撃は、さかさま人狼における人間役職の要、

「猟師」が毎晩、狼を撃っていく方式に変更。
やる事自体は、普通の人狼とほぼ変わりはありません。

ただ、異なるのは【立場】だけです。
それだけなのに人狼の常識が通用しないという摩訶不思議な現象が起きています。
-- description by publisher

boardgame: 碧藍航線集換式對戰卡牌 (Azur Lane Trading Card Game)
description:
Translate by google translate：
"Azur Lane Trading Cards" (referred to as Azur Lane Trading Cards, ALCG) is a newly developed TCG physical card game based on Azur Lane. In this game, the ship girls from the original work will accompany the commander in the form of cards. Commanders need to combine different cards to build their own decks based on their own tactics and strategies to compete with other commanders.

《碧藍航線集換式對戰卡牌》（簡稱，碧藍戰卡，ALCG）是一款以碧藍航線為背景全新開發的TCG實體卡牌遊戲。本款遊戲中，原作中的艦船美少女們將以卡牌的形式陪伴在指揮官身邊。指揮官需根據自己的戰術和策略，組合不同的卡牌來構建自己的卡組，與其他指揮官一決高下。

The night falls over the Grand Museum and its incredible collection of relics. It's time to take action to get your hands on them and prove that you are the best thief in the world. But be careful! Not only must you avoid their tireless guards, but also the terrible mummy that roams lost in the Grand Museum, defeating anyone who crosses its path... Can you be the fastest thief and escape unscathed from the Grand Museum?

Crazy Museum is a competitive game for one to four players. The goal of each player is to collect the most relics without getting caught. To achieve this, you'll need to manage a pool of actions to find various objects scattered throughout the museum, use different power-ups available from vending machines, and feed cheese to your rat friend to help hinder your opponents.

—description from the publisher

Kill Draugr Kill is a solo print and play tower defense game. Draugr move toward the player, represented by a draugr track. 
To kill draugr, the player must flick dice (representing arrows) onto zones that have various effects. 
You need headshots to kill draugr. Kill all the draugr before they reach you to win.

In Hanse, you get to represent your trade Kontor and sell the goods you brought with you quickly and cleverly. The player who has the fewest points at the end of the day or has got rid of all his cards wins! But you must not make your calculations without the other players and you are also not safe from historical events. A good memory and speed are the keys to success!

Learn about the culture and history of the great "Hansestadt" Hamburg and immerse yourself in one of the most turbulent and intelligent card games you‘ve probably ever played! Hanse - Kontoriate comes with 80 hand-drawn cards and will quickly pull you into the bustling world of the melting pot that is Hamburg's harbor!

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Wind Dizzy Bee up and listen as he buzzes around and moves up down and around the garden, scooping up honey pots and bringing them home to his beehive. The dial on top of the beehive tells players which color flower to put their honey pot on. But you can never tell if Dizzy Bee will scoop up a honey pot... or which one it will be. If he brings home all three of your honey pots first, you win.

—description from the publisher

It's time to discover the dominant side of your mind with this brain-defining game!  Answer questions or undertake challenges from each of the six categories, designed to decipher which side of your brain functions best!  Will you prove to be an analytical and methodical 'lefty' or a creative and artistic 'righty'?

—description from the back of the box

A light, party-type, social game.  Players are against the clock to complete as many questions/challenges in each of 6 categories as they can over three rounds.  For each correct answer, they add a brain token to their brain card.  At the end whomever has the most tokens is the winner, but they also discover if they are more Einstein or Picasso.

boardgame: Relic Knights: Star Nebula Corsairs – Broadside
description:
The Broadside minion offers both a powerful beam weapon to attack troops & ships and shields to protect nearby friendlies.

Broadside is an unpainted Minion model set for Relic Knight's Star Nebula Corsairs faction. The unit cards for this model are available in the Star Nebula Corsairs Cadre Deck.

boardgame: MetaX TCG: Attack on Titan Starter
description: This MetaX starter deck kit has two decks based around Survey Corps and Titans from the "Attack on Titan" animé series. The decks can be played against each other as-is, or combined with cards from other sets.

Contains Combopolis as well as these expansions for Agropolis: 

     Agropolis: Seasons
     Agropolis: Points of Interest
     Agropolis: Invasion

Special Military Operation Against Taiwan 202X is a simulation of an armed conflict between the U.S. military and the Japanese Self-Defense Forces against the People's Liberation Army of China in the event of a Taiwan contingency in the late 2020s. It uses a card-driven system with regular playing cards, and reproduces the complexity of modern warfare with various events. Compete to see how you can create an advantageous situation before the ceasefire negotiations.

Ordeal in the Pacific is a 1942 Pacific War campaign game. Fight for control of air bases in the Pacific Ocean. This game was the basis for the tablet game "Komapu" "Aircraft Carrier Battle 1942".
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
The Gettysburg Campaign is a game that recreates the Battle of Gettysburg, which was the de facto decisive battle of the American Civil War, at a strategic level.

Riding on the momentum of winning the Battle of Chancellorsville, Confederate General Lee planned a further offensive in the North. The targets were Baltimore and Philadelphia, and by capturing them, they were trying to discourage the North from continuing the war. Skirmishes began in June, and on July 6, the two armies entered into full-scale fighting at Gettysburg, where railroads and major roads converge.

Confederate players will lead three legions, while Union players will lead seven legions in the most intense battle of the Civil War.

Note: This game is the same as Gettysburg Campaign, which was announced in Command Magazine issue 7 and is now available as a PnP game.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

boardgame: Final Fantasy VII Remake Boardgame: Materia Hunter
description:
Final Fantasy VII Remake Boardgame: Materia Hunter is a competitive game for two players (1v1) or four players (2v2) where players compete to collect the most Materia using abilities of the iconic characters from  Final Fantasy VII Remake.

Every character has unique abilities, so it's up to the player to actively utilize them and get an edge over their opponent.  Being proactive with each character's strengths not only allows you to gather Materia easily, but it also provides a strategic element to the game for players to enjoy.

There are Special Actions, moves with powerful effects that can turn the tides in your favor if used right.

Materia are separated into 5 types. A player who has gathered the most amount of a Materia Cards of a certain type takes possession of that particular Materia tile. At the end of the game, the player (or team, if playing 2v2) in possession of the most Materia tiles is the winner.

3 different scenarios with easy, medium and expert difficulty levels.
 After celebrating Rachel's birthday, you wake up in Monica and Rachel's apartment, where everything is upside down. Chandler and Joey are about to go out but impossible! The door is closed, and the key is nowhere to be found in all this mess. Rachel starts to panic. She has arranged to meet her parents, who are in the middle of a divorce, in an hour at Central Perk and if she arrives after them, they risk killing each other. You better leave the apartment as soon as possible!
 You have 60 minutes, not one more, to escape the apartment! And if you succeed, two other scenarios await you in the legendary locations of the series: at Central Perk and in Chandler and Joey's apartment!

240 questions for Before the dress, the tears of joy, the bouquet toss and the embarrassing speeches of drunken witnesses, it's time to party with the girls!
240 questions to get wild before the big day!

—description from the back of the box

2 set of rules:
Individual: Gather 2 to 10 trusted girlfriends. Draw cards and follow the instructions in order to perform, gossip, share your dreams... The first girl who gather 1 card of each category wins!

2 teams: try to have more cards than the other team.

Pipi Caca Culotte is a friendly board game for (almost) the whole family. This is a card game during which you have to guess words or expressions bordering on political correctness.

—description from the back of the box

How to play:
Shuffle cards and put the cards face up.
Decide the score to reach (usually the same as the number of players).
For the first player, pick a card and choose a color or a symbol and try to have the other players to guess your card. If it is guessed, you are marking a point, and then the first player is the one who guessed.

—user summary

Goal:
Respond straight away to win more cards than your opponents.
The game is over when there is no remaining
only one card in the draw pile.
The winner is the player who made the
no more cards.

How to play:
At the start of the game, designate an Attacker.
The oldest, the most beautiful,the one who has the most answers more scathing, or the one who combines these three characteristics, you choose.
The Attacker is the one who judges the relevance of the
replies and anecdotes during penalties (see below).
For each new game, designate a new Attacker.

The other players must keep the hands on the table.

The Striker places the deck of cards on the table, illustrations down and back of the cards facing up.

The deck is clearly visible to everyone because it is the color at the top of the deck that determines the type of repartee to use.
The Striker takes the first card. And so it reveals the new color at the top of the deck.

He reads aloud the spade of the card.

The first player to knock on the table has the floor.

He wins the card if:

     The instruction was respected
     This is not a cliché
     The reply does not contain any bad words
     He responds quickly after hitting the table
     He doesn't show that he is upset


The Striker takes the next card, and we continue.

What if you knew the next victim? A serial killer, certainly the bloodiest that history has known, is on the loose... And he will strike again.

Deep down, you are afraid. It's normal. But unfortunately for you, you no longer have time to be afraid. You are the lead investigator on this case and lives are at stake! You must use stratagems and tricks to corner him. To do this, you have to get into your head. Think, think, be like him.

Will you be able to foil his macabre plan before it’s too late?

In ALLÁ juega con ÉSTA billetera ("THERE play with THIS wallet" A player takes a card and reads the phrase on the back, then leaves it in the center of the table.


     Whoever covers the card first, and responds to the phrase with something that can include There, This one or whatever comes to mind, wins the card.
     Whoever reads the card cannot cover, and who wins is the one who reads the next card.
     The player who gets 5 cards wins the game.
     If someone covers the card but gets stuck in his answer or says anything, he discards that card and must read the next one in the deck.


Includes 3 game modes and 80 trigger phrases to answer.
---
The deck of 40 cards is shuffled, and a random player takes the first card at the top of the deck to start the game:

Turn the card over, and read the phrase on the back (Each card has a phrase on both sides). Then, he leaves the card in the center of the table and within reach of all players.

Whoever covers the card first, and responds to the phrase with something that can include There, This one or whatever comes to mind, wins the card.

Whoever reads the card cannot cover, and who wins is the one who reads the next card.

The player who gets 5 cards wins the game.

If someone covers the card but gets stuck in his answer or says anything, he discards that card and must read the next one in the deck.

In game mode 2, 3 cards are dealt to each player. To begin, the starting player chooses two other players, and reads one of his hand cards to them. The one of the two who first covers the letter and answers something related to There or This, keeps the letter. The player who did not win continues the game, choosing two other players.
The game ends when there are not at least two players with a card in hand.
All players count the number of cards obtained. Whoever has the most cards wins the game.

For the third game mode, they can all be everywhere and not necessarily around a table.

One player will be the guide, and will say phrases from the deck of cards. The player who raises his hand the fastest will be able to answer the phrase, and keep said card. If more than one lifts at a time, the guide can choose who answers.

The player with the most cards in his can wins. In case of a tie, the victory is shared.

Are you good at making excuses? In this game your creativity is tested so as not to be the one who takes the blame.

- For rounds there will be a "Guide" and a situation card: Someone did not put up money for the food; or he forgot to bring the ice... And it could have been you!

- With the words of your cards, try to excuse yourself and pass the blame to other players.

- When everyone has spoken at least once, the Guide decides who was the least convinced and therefore is the "Guilty" of the round.

- This is a game that also lends itself to inventing your own situations or narrating in a group.
---
Express your creativity to invent the best excuse with the cards you have!

Are you good at making excuses? In this game your creativity is tested so as not to be the one who takes the blame.

MODE 1: Don't tell me

For rounds there will be a "Guide" and a situation card: Someone did not put up money for the food; or he forgot to bring the ice... And it could have been you!

With the words of your cards, try to excuse yourself and pass the blame to other players.

Each player will have 3 cards in hand at the beginning of the game. You can use only one in the entire game, or as many as you want. When everyone has spoken at least once, the Guide decides who was the least convinced and therefore is the "Guilty" of the round.

In this game mode, all players win except one, who will be the one who wins the guide's vote for the least convincing or uncreative story. That player can also lose if he can't think of anything to justify himself.

MODE 2: You don't know what happened to me!

For this game mode, all players receive 3 cards. There will not be a guide.

In turns, each player will tell what happened to him that week, using his 3 cards as the beginning-middle-end. It may be a very unfortunate situation, or something very unusual, it is up to each player.

When everyone finishes with their story, a vote is taken and the player who has received the most votes is the winner for his or her original and creative story. In case of ties, more than one player may share the victory in this game mode.

This is a game that also lends itself to inventing your own situations or narrating in a group.

The goal of the game is to fill the cursed gauge of your opponents to eliminate them from the game using different types of cards (Fourberies, Defenses, Picks and Unnecessary Gifts)... but above all you must offer a maximum of Cursed Gifts!

Players must use these cards to eliminate their opponents and become the last player: The winner.

The game is full of surprises and reversals, making each game unique and exciting!

—description from the publisher (translated)

Le but du jeu est de remplir la maudite jauge de ses adversaires pour les éliminer du jeu à l'aide de différents types de cartes (Fourberies, Défenses, Pioches et Cadeaux Inutiles)...mais surtout il faut offrir un maximum de Maudits Cadeaux !

Les joueurs doivent utiliser ces cartes pour éliminer leurs adversaires et devenir le dernier joueur : Le vainqueur.

Le jeu est rempli de surprises et de retournements de situation, rendant chaque partie unique et passionnante !

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Star Trek: Attack Wing – Federation Faction Pack: These Are the Voyages
description:
Celebrate the 10-year Anniversary of Star Trek Attack Wing with the These are the Voyages Faction Pack, as players can warp into their games with new and updated versions of each version of the U.S.S. Enterprise from the game’s history. Take command of 5 special golden display versions of 5 different Federation ships: An NX Class, a Constitution-Class (Refit), an Excelsior-Class, a Galaxy-Class, and a Sovereign-Class, with each of the famous Crews and Captains of the Enterprise. New actions, new cards, and a unique Multiplayer mission await along with many more surprises!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Kings League Infojobs: El Juego de Cartas
description:
Goals worth 2? Super saves? A field that changes size? Prepare the plays with your team and activate your President with the button to enhance the attacks. Keep an eye on the dice and, above all... Be careful with Piqué's cards!

Before starting the game, pick a trainer card, a special power, and a set of random cards. Each turn, both players play face down a team member and check which wins to move the ball card into the next areas with the aim of scoring. First to five points, wins.

Under the Surface is the third expansion for Among Cultists. Enter the deadly ice in Antarctica and sear for Organism 46-B. This map introduces new mechanics: loot to equip & the awakening of Organism 46-B, which will change the endgame conditions.
Also some new roles!

A game that raises awareness and gives meaning to those affected.

"Is there milk in there?" Luis' standard question. He has a milk allergy. We, his parents, have to experience time and again that those around us know far too little about food allergies, which is why there was once even a life-threatening incident.

We want to change that: with the Allergy laying and memo game! 26 children look for their food allergen.

Alongside egg, peanut, fish, nuts, soy and wheat, milk is one of the allergens to which children react most frequently. The memo game Allergy! also revolves around these seven allergens. 26 children are looking for their food allergen.

I have drawn children from all cultures who are happy about a food and then have an allergic reaction to it: For example, a little girl bites into a chocolate marshmallow. The allergen egg is depicted on the corresponding card and the child has pustules. Players can easily match cards, as the child depicted and the background match on the pairs of cards.

Players not only learn which allergens can be found in food, but also the various allergic reactions: from itchy, burning skin redness and swelling to digestive and circulatory problems and breathing difficulties.

A pair of cards also explains how emergency medication can help allergy sufferers in the event of an anaphylactic shock. The game box also contains useful information on the topic. 
We need your consent to load this video

Unboxing! What's inside?

When drawing, I made sure to package the serious topic in a funny way. The allergic reactions are depicted in an exaggerated way, which is particularly popular with young players and arouses their interest in the topic.

The game, which has been thoroughly tested by the German Allergy and Asthma Association (DAAB), is aimed at children of toddler and preschool age.

It consists of 56 cards, including four information cards. The appealing and child-friendly illustrations were created by Anita Barry.

The laying and memo game was produced in Germany using FSC-certified materials that are safe for children.

—description from the publisher

The headless horseman once again rises from his grave as a new character players can choose, using an assortment of swords and rifles, along with a jack-o-lantern, as weapons. Because he has no head, any hit rolls to the head count as misses, and he can only be killed by destroying the body.
The space ranger is added as a playable character, bringing an arsenal of laser guns, along with a tricorder, to choose from.

The Curse of Camp Wila-Haunchoo is a game of trust, lies, and betrayal. As a camper in this cursed campground, you might not leave with your soul intact.

Players are secretly assigned Roles, either a Camper or Cursed. Using anything from machetes to toilet paper, you must find and kill every last Cursed. But be warned, there's no telling which friends are Cursed!

—description from the designer
The pirate lands in the combat ring to as another character to play, bringing his trusty hook, black-powder pistols, and a treasure of booty.
A gelatinous blob becomes a playable character, using various corrosive fluids to defeat enemies, while also being able to regenerate body parts.

The Corsac Fox is trying to secure his throne in Plumeholm through fear and clout. You, The Hooded Magpie, will stand in his way.

You are alone, observing the Corsac Fox’ acts of cruelty, deception and corruption from the rooftops, aware of his devious schemes. You will not be able to stop every event, but you might be able to stop the right ones with the right means, even just to buy Plumeholm another day.

And, if you’re lucky, maybe you'll buy yourself a chance to confront the Corsac Fox himself.

The Hooded Magpie is a Solo 18-card puzzle adventure that utilizes mechanics of crisis mitigation, dice manipulation, and resource management and is rich in meaningful choices. In a span of two rounds, at every turn, you will choose which opponents to confront, which encounters to face, which tragedies you have to abandon, and which wins will contribute to the bigger picture. Choose your battles wisely and you may just be able to bring down the Corsac Fox and bring hope to Plumeholm.

—description from the designer

Djinnchilla is a captivating board game centered around summoning and bonding with magical creatures called Djinnchillas. The game, suitable for 2 to 5 players, starts with setting up two decks of Djinnchilla cards – Regular and Awaken – and preparing exploration cards based on the number of players.

In each round, players engage in various actions: summoning Djinnchillas from a shared row or deck, fusing male and female Djinnchillas to draw powerful Awaken cards, trading cards to acquire specific Awaken Djinnchillas, and exploring to gather exploration cards for additional benefits. The game ends when any of the decks (exploration, regular, or Awaken Djinnchilla) runs out.

Scoring is based on the collection of Djinnchilla cards with a focus on forming sets of different elements. The player with the highest score, combining points from Djinnchilla and exploration cards, wins the game. Djinnchilla combines strategic card play with a charming fantasy theme, appealing to players who enjoy tactical decision-making and a touch of magic​​.

—description from the designer

The great stone lattice of the Ziggurat holds back the encroaching void; the structure as much a mystery as the solitary Monolith at its heart. An eternal champion, reborn across eons, is drawn inexorably to this enigmatic nexus, a seal at the very centre of the multiverse.

The Ziggurat's colossal granite edifices exist simultaneously across countless worlds, its glyphs flickering with eldritch energy. From the dense, dragon-haunted jungles of the Viridian Expanse to realms uncharted, it beckons; home to countless civilisations both human and alien, thriving and decaying in its shadow.

Our hero's countless lives navigate the Ziggurat’s ancient halls and labyrinthine caves to bear witness to the emergence of an ancient sentience and a battle between existence and the relentless, life sapping nihilism of the Void.

Each life an incarnation of the eternal champion and scion of fate. Each quest, unique in its objectives draws you deeper into this eternal struggle.

Will you shape the fate of the multiverse, or simply bear witness as the wheel of time turns? Your eternal journey awaits.

—description from the designer

Overbaked! is a dynamic board game for 2 to 5 players that brings the excitement of pastry baking to life. Players step into the shoes of pastry chefs, navigating through strategic rounds that test their planning and risk-taking skills. The game's phases - Preparation, Baking, and Selling - each offer unique challenges and opportunities. In Preparation, players select from a mix of regular and 'Overbaked' (OB) pastry cards, setting the stage for their baking strategies.

The Baking phase introduces an element of suspense, as players flip their cards to find pastries, mindful of the risk posed by OB cards. Deciding whether to stop or risk continuing adds a thrilling push-your-luck aspect. Then, in the Selling phase, players engage in strategic decision-making to fulfill orders from the Order row or earn points by trading pastries, balancing their choices to maximize their score.

The game culminates after a predetermined number of rounds, where players tally their points primarily from order fulfillment. Overbaked! rewards the player with the highest score, celebrating the strategy and risks taken during the game. This blend of strategy, risk, and engaging gameplay makes Overbaked! a delightful experience for those who enjoy a competitive yet whimsical gaming atmosphere.

—description from the designer

The player advances his pedestrian along the streets and sidewalks. If the player wishes to use a vehicle, he exchanges the pedestrian for the corresponding vehicle (only at the corresponding stations or airport) and pays the fee. However, passenger trains, bus trams have to stop at every station, express trains and railcars do not. If a means of transport is no longer used, you put it back in the box and it can then be used by another player.

There are 3 versions of play, according to the method of determining movement:

     by number die
     by vehicle die
     by money 


The goal of the game is tho reach various relaxing spots on the map to collect tokens of different worth. The game ends, when all but one player are back at home. The player to arrive at home with the most valuable tokens wins the game.

—user summary

There is no door in this room. The human had been shut in for so long that the door lost its purpose and disappeared. At first, the spider disliked the human, unable to see the value in someone who lacked the courage to leave. But when the door vanished, it realized the human's true sorrow. The spider and its friends decided to work together to somehow get the human outside.

Every time the human moves, they leave trash behind. The spider diligently eats this trash, keeping the room clean. The consumed trash becomes nourishment, which the spider uses to spin the only pathway for the human to leave – a thread. It continues this every day, hoping for the day when its wish for the human to go outside will come true.

Unaware of the spider's earnest love, the human breaks the thread path the spider has spun. The game's system involves 'Route Construction + Destruction and Regeneration', where the spider spins threads that the human breaks. The system presents a harsh choice between strategic benefits for progressing in the game, or flavor benefits to enrich the human's life outside, through the 'Amida Spider System'. This system conveys a strong message to you. Do you want to win the game, or do you want to see the human start a new life?

—description from the designer
publishers: ひとりじゃ、生きられない。(I Cannot Live By Myself)

description:
Nawiedzona Kuchnia is a solo deck building game. Prepare enough sandwiches to make it through the night, while chasing away ghosts in the Haunted Kitchen. Each round draw five cards and use three of them to chase away ghosts, prepare sandwiches, and add cards to your deck.

After 18 rounds, count the points awarded for prepared sandwiches, current goal card, and gained advanced action cards.

—user summary

Nawiedzona Kuchnia to jednoosobowa gra karciana polegająca na budowaniu talii w trakcie rozgrywki. Twoim celem, jako Lisiej Strażniczki,  jest zrobienie jak największej liczby kanapek. Pojawiające się duchy, które opętują przedmioty, będą Ci w tym przeszkadzać. Z duchami też musisz się uporać.

Co turę dobierasz 5 kart i używasz 3 z nich, aby odganiać duchy, szykować kanapki czy rozwijać Lisią Strażniczkę o nowymi kartami, odblokowujące nowe możliwości.

Na koniec tury każdy aktywny duch wykona swoją akcję. Mogą Cię osłabić, zjeść kawałek kanapki albo wypić Twoją drogocenną kawę. Kawa w tej grze jest bardzo ważna, bo pozwala Ci wykonywać potężniejsze zagrywki!

Na koniec 18 tury, gra się kończy. Wówczas podliczasz punkty za kanapki, specjalny cel i zdobyte karty akcji.

Udało się? Bawo! Jeśli nie, nie martw się – grę przygotujesz ponownie w niecałe 2 minuty.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Crime Cases: Werde zum Ermittler! – Verbrecherjagd mit Sherlock Holmes
description:
The new series for all mystery puzzle fans: interactive puzzle adventure with lots of exciting and mysterious clues and evidence. Can you solve the tricky cases?
It's crime time: track down mysterious clues, decipher encrypted messages and crack secret codes - in the interactive mystery puzzle adventures in book form, you become an investigator and have to solve exciting criminal cases. Test your powers of observation and put your logical thinking skills to the test. Will you accept the challenge?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Crime Cases: Werde zum Ermittler! – Dem Verbrechen auf der Spur
description:
The new series for all mystery puzzle fans: interactive puzzle adventure with lots of exciting and mysterious clues and evidence. Can you solve the tricky cases?
It's crime time: track down mysterious clues, decipher encrypted messages and crack secret codes - in the interactive mystery puzzle adventures in book form, you become an investigator and have to solve exciting criminal cases. Test your powers of observation and put your logical thinking skills to the test. Will you accept the challenge?

—description from the publisher

No matter where you are - with this exciting City, Country, Superhero edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the table! You can test your superhero knowledge and put your creativity to the test in 26 categories. With its cool design and exciting topics, the game pad will win over every Marvel fan, big or small. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something for everyone here. Dive into the world of superheroes and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the biggest Marvel fan and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required to be the first to shout "Stop!". Are you ready to immerse yourself in the world of the Avengers and co. Then grab your pencils, get set, go!
The person who fills in the gaps the fastest wins.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Le Trésor Perdu de Richster Islands
description:
Go on a treasure hunt in the islands, crisscross the beaches and mountains of the Richster Islands, in search of the lost treasure of your ancestor: Lady Mary Killigrew

While rummaging in one of the attics of the old family castle, you found an old trunk containing documents and a surprising letter written by one of your ancestors. You were always told that there were pirates in the family, but you never knew more…until today.

The letter had obviously never been opened and still bore a seal with a skull. Prove your courage to your ancestor Mary Killigrew, use the notes to return to the atoll and find the secrets of the Crown but, above all, its fabulous treasures!

Your mission: find the exact spot where Mary buried her treasure.

boardgame: L' Arche Maudite: Les trésors des pharaons
description:
Go in search of the Cursed Ark. Legend says that once opened, it will reveal the treasure of the pharaohs, a mystical object of legendary power.

Unfortunately you are not the only ones who want to find the Ark. The Zanis, the most powerful criminal organization of your time, covet it for dark projects. You absolutely must find and open the Ark before them to protect the world from this artifact.

So put on your best archaeologist hat and go on an adventure around the world!

Do you know how to tame dragons? You'll have to learn quickly if you want to save the Kingdom from destruction and ruin. Without the dragon egg, peace will never return.

To this day, the nine kingdoms are at war. Only you have the ability to restore order to this world. But to get there, you have to take a winding path, strewn with pitfalls. You will follow in the footsteps of the last Dragon Lord. Find the egg. Hatch it. And tame its power.

Do you think you have what it takes to be a Lord?

boardgame: Wer gewinnt den Hauspokal?: für Potter-Fans
description:
Who will win the house cup? This card box provides lots of fun!
Who is a real Potterhead and knows the most about the wizarding world? Over 60 action cards with exciting quiz questions, tricky puzzles and brainteasers as well as fun activities provide lots of magical fun for all Potterheads aged 10 and over. DIY Quidditch, broom race or catching flying keys - speed, concentration, skill and, of course, wizarding knowledge are required here. The perfect gift for all fans of the wizarding world.

—description from the publisher

Void Intentions is a dungeon-crawling, print-and-play, roll-and-write game. It's set in the same world as Void Halls, but the roles are reversed. Now, take on the role of a "hero", explore, and plunder this dungeon. The dice are rolled, fate is written, and riches await you. But be careful — death might find you, as these dungeons are full of dangers and traps. It's an unbalanced, solo game, that provides a different experience in every playthrough.

Choose your character. Each character possesses distinctive starting attributes, Life and unique quest. Your inventory is where you keep track of your supplies and treasures gained. There are 30 rounds: 23 hourglass rounds and 7 camp rounds. In each round, move your character onto an adjacent square on the dungeon map. After you move, roll as many dice as the level of the room you're in (indicated next to it) - to determine what encounter you have found on the specific square on the map. Draw the exploration icon on the map square that you have just explored. Each encounter affects you in a certain way. Inventory items can be used while camping. You may spend the treasures and supplies that you have collected to do some actions.

The game ends upon reaching the final stairs at the 5th level.

—description from the publisher

No matter where you are - with this exciting City, Country, Ladies' Night edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the table! You can test your knowledge of handbags, lipstick colors and teen idols in 26 categories and put your creativity to the test. The game pad boasts a cool design and exciting topics. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something for everyone here.
Creative lipstick color, things that fit in a handbag or the perfect place for a first date - celebrate your femininity and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the most creative and can fill out the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required to be the first to shout "Stop!". Are you ready? Then grab your (lip) pen, get set, go!

—description from the publisher

No matter where you are - with this tingling City, Country, Hot & Sexy edition, you'll always bring a large portion of spice to the table! You can test your knowledge of sex toys, dirty talk and hook-ups in 26 categories and put your creativity to the test. The game block impresses with its sexy design and hot topics. From simple questions to raunchy categories - there's something here for everyone.
Funniest safeword, tingling place for sex or funny synonyms for genitals? Test yourself and your friends - which of you has the dirtiest imagination and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required to be the first to shout "Stop!". Are you ready? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!
The person who fills in all the gaps the fastest wins.

—description from the publisher

No matter where you are - with this exciting City, Country, 90s edition, you'll always bring a big dose of fun to the party! You can test your knowledge of the cult decade in 26 categories and put your creativity to the test. The game pad boasts a cool design and exciting topics - perfect for all nostalgics. From simple questions to tricky categories - there's something here for everyone.
Boybands, fashion sins or cult objects - indulge in nostalgia, reminisce about the 90s and test yourself and your friends - which of you is the biggest 90s expert and can fill in the categories the fastest? Factual knowledge, creativity and speed are required to be the first to shout "Stop!". Are you ready? Then grab your pencils, get set, go!

—description from the publisher
A new map for 1817 that shortens the game, and makes it more suitable for 3 players

boardgame: Squid: The Game – Das inoffizielle Spiel zur Netflix-Erfolgsserie
description:
The action-packed, nerve-wracking Netflix series Squid Game is now finally available as a game to play at home! A thrilling gaming experience awaits you with 60 cards, the dreaded guardian and only one winner. Feel the thrill: Who will win the game of life and death?
This fast-paced game for 2 to 6 people requires skill, speed and a bit of luck. Put your skills to the test and survive to the end! Who will make it to the last round? There can only be one winner!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: あてずっぽ殺人事件 ～福澤家の落日～(Aimless Murder Case: Sunset of the Fukuzawa Family)
description:
On that day, a clandestine meeting was held at the Fukuzawa mansion, which even servants were not allowed to enter. But the next day, something happened. The body of a family member was found in the mansion, covered with bundles of money. 
Everyone had alibi, so the search was bogged down, and the beleaguered police had to invite several detectives to assist.

Players will become detectives in the game, and their goal is to guess the character covering the card in the center of the field, that is, the prisoner, faster than other players. Use card swaps or special effects to gather clues and express your own reasoning. It is possible that the first round will be the watershed that determines the outcome... In such cases, it's all about guessing!

その日、福澤家本邸では使用人すら出入りを許されない一族だけの密会が行われた。
事件は翌日に起きた。一族の一人が札束にまみれた状態で遺体で見つかったのだ。
しかし他殺を裏付ける証拠は見つからず捜査は難航、
焦る警部は探偵たちを頼みの綱とし呼び寄せたのであった―――

プレイヤーは探偵となり、誰よりも早く伏せられたカード(犯人)の特定を目指します。
カード交換や特殊効果で手掛かりを集め推理を披露してください。
時には一巡が勝負の分かれ目となることも…そんな時は一か八かあてずっぽで勝負です！

在那一天，福澤家宅邸進行了一場連傭人都禁止入內的家族密會。然而就在隔天，出事了。有一位家族成員的屍體被發現在宅邸內，屍體上鋪滿了成捆的鈔票。
所有人都有不在場證明，搜查因此陷入困境，焦頭爛額的警部迫不得已邀請了幾位偵探來協助。

玩家在遊戲中將化身偵探，目標是要比其他玩家更快猜到場地中央覆蓋卡牌的角色，也就是犯人。請使用卡牌交換或特殊效果來蒐集線索，並發表自己的推理。有可能第一個回合就會成為決定勝負的分水嶺......此時就要孤注一擲地依靠臆斷推理來找出犯人！

boardgame: おっぱいポーカーBraff (Oppai Poker Braff)
description:
おっぱいポーカーBraff (Oppai Poker Braff) is a hidden identity game from Japan.

Eight characters play a hand of cards to make their boobs bigger and play for pride! Braff is a game similar to Poker. The winner is the player who earns the most chips (pride) by hiding the true size of their boobs, bluffing and making sure their fake boobs are not exposed.

８人のキャラクターが、手札を使って自分のおっぱいを大きくし、プライドをかけて勝負する！『ブラふ』はポーカーに似たゲームです。おっぱいの本当の大きさを隠してブラフをかけたり、にせおっぱいがばれないようにして、一番チップ（プライド）を稼いだ人が勝ちです。
--description by publisher

スペースレース・ボッツ (SPACERACE-BOTS) is a roll & move robot fighting game from Japan.

Each player controls a fighting bot and sends it around the track to attack the opponents and collect prize money. The first player to reach 1 million Yen is the winner. Players collect three kinds of cards, Arms, Legs, Attack, and combine these to build a better bot.

The game has a short square track and the ability to attack is affected by the relative position on the track. So if the enemy bot is on the same side of the track as the attacker, it is easier to attack. Then the left or right side and finally the far side is hardest to attack.

Further, the more times a bot circles the track, not only does the prize money rise but it also multiplies. So by making three laps before a fight, a player can win triple money.

The winner of each fight steals money from the enemy, but the game includes many elements to reverse fortunes. So the designer advocates attacking quickly and often and not waiting for better equipment to turn up.
description by user

ENGLISH DESCRIPTION

With the Express Harry Potter Profile, you will be able to test your knowledge in four categories inspired by the films that enchanted fans around the world.

Each card has 10 tips worth up to 10 points each, with the first tips being less “revelio” and the following ones having more chances of being correct.

This version has a unique marker and is designed for two people or two teams to play. The big winner will be the one who accumulates the most points over five exciting rounds.

Challenge your friends and family who love the Harry Potter saga to a competition full of magic and fun!


PORTUGUESES DESCRIPTION

Com o Perfil Express Harry Potter, você vai poder testar seus conhecimentos em quatro categorias inspiradas nos filmes que encantaram fãs do mundo todo.

Cada cartela possui 10 dicas que valem até 10 pontos cada, sendo as primeiras dicas menos “revelio”, e as seguintes, com mais chances de acerto.

Esta versão possui um marcador exclusivo e foi desenvolvida para duas pessoas ou duas equipes jogarem. O grande vencedor será aquele que acumular mais pontos ao longo de cinco emocionantes rodadas.

Desafie seus amigos e familiares que amam a saga Harry Potter para uma competição cheia de magia e diversão!

ENGLISH DESCRIPTION

PERFIL EXPRESS MÚSICA: a new way to play this Grow classic in a themed version that exclusively encompasses the world of music.

The game features five fun categories that will test everyone's knowledge: MUSICAL GENRE, BRAZILIAN MUSICIANS, INTERNATIONAL MUSICIANS, BRAZILIAN BANDS AND INTERNATIONAL BANDS.

Each card has 10 tips worth up to 10 points. The first tip is less revealing, and the following ones, progressively, increase the chances of getting it right.

Who has never wanted to challenge their musical expertise with friends in a quick and exciting way?

Get into the rhythm and get the crowd together to make the most of this rich content from PERFIL EXPRESS MÚSICA.



PORTUGUESE DESCRIPTION

Perfil Express Música: uma nova forma de jogar este clássico da Grow em uma versão com temática que engloba exclusivamente o mundo da música.

O jogo trás cinco divertidas categorias que vão testar o conhecimento da galera: GÊNERO MUSICAL, MÚSICOS NACIONAIS, MÚSICOS INTERNACIONAIS, BANDAS NACIONAIS E BANDAS INTERNACIONAIS.

Cada cartela possui 10 dicas que valem até 10 pontos. A primeira dica é menos reveladora, e as seguintes, de maneira progressiva, aumentam mais as chances de acerto.

Quem nunca quis desafiar sua expertise musical com os amigos de uma maneira rápida e emocionante?

Entre no ritmo e reúna a galera para aproveitar ao máximo esse rico conteúdo do PERFIL EXPRESS MÚSICA

boardgame: Vampire: The Masquerade – Rivals: Month of Darkness 2022 Card Pack
description:
This 5-card promo pack for Vampire: The Masquerade Rivals features the cards available in the Month of Darkness 2022 Promo Pack.

Vampires included:

     Carmina Magnus, Ventrue
     Reina De La Vega, Tremere
     Luviere Bataille, Toreador
     Giselle della Scala, Lasombra
     R.T Thassos, Gangrel
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

boardgame: Vampire: The Masquerade – Rivals: Season 2 Promo Pack
description:
The Vampire: The Masquerade Rivals Expandable Card Game Season 2 Promo Pack contains the following cards:

     Dancing House (Haven)
     Youth Hostel (Haven)
     Xander Klaus (Gangrel vampire)
     The Exterminator (Nosferatu vampire)
     Timothy Schwartz (Lasombra vampire)
     Fujiko (Hecate vampire)
     Race to the Bottom (Agenda)
     Balace in All Things (Agenda)
     Prague National Bank

A set of four goal cards to be used with Junk Drawer.  Each card has one letter from the word "JUNK" and requires the player to cover all the spaces that make up the letter. Cards are:

J: Hard
U: Medium
N: Medium
K: Easy

“Uh oh! We are stranded in a messy SARGASSO SEA OF SPACE and our noble spaceship is all banged to heck. Like, broke forever. Kaput. 
Let’s hurry and improvise some smaller and, we’re sure, perfectly space-worthy lifeboats so we can blast out of here before the SARGASSO SEA OF SPACE claims us forever! We’ll have to split up and explore, describing what we find over our SPACE RADIOS!"

And that's what you do! A Sargasso Sea of Space is competitively-cooperative game of describing the indescribable and then staking your space-life on the hope that the description was good.

Each player draws a handful of WHAT I NEED cards which are blue prints for the items they need to build their escape ship. These cards are kept secret! Then, in turn, each player draws a WHAT I FOUND card and describes it using just language–no gestures allowed!

—description from the publisher

Welcome to the Pocket Wars! Unleash your imagination and transform everyday items into powerful "Curios" with mind-bending abilities. It's fast, fun, and fosters creativity! Whats in your pocket?!

In Pocket Wars, players will pull an item from their pocket and assign it a special ability of their creation. Each player has 5 health, tracked on your non-dominant hand, and the goal is to be the last player standing. Players simultaneously point at their targets and roll dice. Hits deal damage, shields block hits, and misses do nothing. Brainstorms supersede other outcomes and activate a player's special ability.

Marvel Zombies have come to Vs. System 2PCG! Join Magneto and Black Panther as they fight off the Hunger! Play as or against the Zombie hoards for the first time. 10 new Main characters to play as! Epic competitive gameplay to pit your team of Allies against your opponents!

This is not a stand-alone game. A copy of Vs. System 2PCG: The Marvel Battles is required to play.

Contents:
55 Cards
Rulesheet

In this fast—paced card game two Factions (Survivors and Infected) fight for supremacy in the Wastelands. Survivors must work together to outrun Patient Zero and their horde of zombies, using weapons, cunning and strategy. Patient Zero and the Infected attack relentlessly trying to infect and Turn all Survivors.
​
Survivors win when the last card has been drawn from the Stack and they have not been Turned, or if they survive the Countdown Clock. Patient Zero and Infected Survivors win when they infect and Turn all Survivors.

What makes our game so much fun is that all players stay in the game right to the very end — some still as Survivors, others as Infected.

—description from designer

Two teams of Grandmas will go head-to-head, trying to steal all 5 of their opponents’ garden gnomes that are hidden in their garden. Each Granny takes an individual turn as turns rotate back and forth between teams.

Each Granny has a special ability, but watch out! There are dangers lurking in the garden that will slow your already slow Grandma as you search for gnomes.

Assistance cards could come to rescue from the assisted-living center to either help you or hinder your opponent. The first team to collect all 5 of the other teams’ gnomes, win!

Designed to play 2 -8 players. Including odd numbers of player. If you can read you can play!

—description from the publisher

In Comic Book Boom!, you play as a publisher at the heights of the 1990's comic book craze, looking to make your fortune in the booming market. Whoever makes the most cash by the time the boom busts is the winner.

There are three kinds of cards you'll collect and use throughout the game:


     Books – The comics titles that you publish. The amount you can profit from a book is its Collectibility × its Readership. Many Books are lacking Collectibility, Readership, or both, but have trendy '90s Themes, like "Cyborg" or "Motorcycle", that you can manipulate to achieve higher profits.



     Stunts – Attention-grabbing plots, like "Crossover" or "All-New Look", that Hype up a Book's Themes. Hype drives those Themes higher and higher up the shared Market Board, reaching increasing levels of Readership. If you get too greedy and overhype a Theme, though, Books with that Theme will get canceled and won't turn any profit.



     Enhancements – Manufacturing gimmicks, like Foil Covers or Holograms, that add Collectibility to a Book.


Comic Book Boom! is played over several rounds. Each round is made up of 5 phases that are played simultaneously:

1. Research – Pay money to acquire new a Book, Stunt, or Enhancement card. Research as many times as you'd like, but the cost grows along with your hand.

2. Develop – Secretly plan out your line, playing new cards facedown and adding Stunts and Enhancements onto your Books.

3. Publish – Reveal your Books and move their Themes up the Market Board based on how much Hype they have.

4. Profit – Cancel any overhyped Books, losing any cards on them and moving the Bubble up the Market Board. Make money from the rest of your Books based on their Collectibility and Readership.

5. Cleanup – Get ready for the next round by picking up your temporary (Stunt and Enhancement) cards, moving the Bubble up the Market Board, and resetting the Themes down to the Bubble's level.

The game ends after Cleanup if the Bubble reached "Burst" on the Market Board or if any player went bankrupt. Whoever has the most money wins. Otherwise, you'll start a new round with another Research phase.

-description from publisher

Welcome to the weather report guessing club! You might not trust weather forecasts at all, but you'll still try to predict tomorrow's weather.

As the active player in Sunny or Rainy, you flip a tile to reveal a number, then reveal cards from the deck equal to the number on the tile. Before revealing each card, you have to declare "sunny" or "rainy". The more consecutive correct guesses you make, you larger your reward...and the larger your risk. The other players watch your guesses and might bet that you will make a mistake...

—description from the designer

boardgame: Shout it Out: Shout Your Way To Victory
description:
Quick reactions are needed for this raucous game. Raise you voice by shouting out your answer to some very random questions. The player who answers first and correctly wins the cards.

—description from the back of the box

With its 3500 questions, Le King des Joe Connaissant is the quiz game your collection is missing. Will you be the King of the past, the King of sports, the King of the world or the King of schnoute?

The first player to conquer 3 kingdoms among the five chosen, by giving the most consecutive correct answers, is crowned KING des Joe Connaissant. Be careful! One wrong answer and the coveted kingdom is lost.

Tu préfères quoi? is a game where you have to make a choice between 2 statements proposed by a YouTuber and explain why. The choices are extremely difficult to make and will create atmosphere, chatter, questions and more during your evenings! The game is ready in just a few seconds and is easy to understand for maximum fun and minimum explanation! You will find several ways to play, and you will also be able to combine cards from all editions of the game Tu préfères quoi? to increase possibilities and pleasure.

The player who take the card secretly chooses one of the two options. Then everyone else votes simultaneously for the answer they think the player chose, and everyone explains the reasons for their vote before the player reveals their decision. Everyone who had the correct answer scores a point. At the end of the game, the person with the most points wins.

Ent’nous autres! is a game that tests the complicity that reigns within a group of players.

To score points, players will have to choose the person who most closely matches each statement. Through the 3 games offered, the players who have the best knowledge of the others will score more points and win the game.

In this 18+ version, players will have to put aside their shyness and modesty. The ideal game to spark laughter, twisted discussions, but above all surprising revelations!

This is an action game where both sides are trying to eliminate each other's soldiers.  The game uses actual firing devices, similar to Crossbows and Catapults.

Players roll a die for actions and use them to either move pieces or fire.  Any soldier that is knocked down is eliminated from the game.  Players can also move their soldiers into contact with the enemy and fight melees. Players can also use magic cards to assist them.

The game comes with:
-2 artifact cards 
-50 magic cards 
-10 soldiers
-1 firing catapults
-1 firing crossbow
-2 firing multi-barrel guns
-ammo for the devices
-1 fortress
-1 die
-rules

It is clear that they are coming for you, will you be able to survive?

In the Last Pirate, life on the high seas is the best. Without rules or ties, in your numerous voyages you have lived countless adventures as a pirate crew. On the high seas you have realized that the gold from the treasure has disappeared and everyone is looking at you.

Choose a name for your pirate with which from now on the crew will address you, you will use the questions from the deck of cards to resolve the situations and try to survive.

Everything the cards say is true, so you'll have to use persuasion to save yourself.

Read the cards aloud.
The accused parties respond.
Vote and choose.

La Última is a narrative game system created by Roberto Alhambra.

An adventure with 30 cards, in which each of them will pose situations that you can only get rid of with your best arguments. The pirate trial begins. Will you end up being food for the sharks?

---

Está claro que van a por ti, ¿serás capaz de sobrevivir?

En la Última Pirata a vida en alta mar es la mejor. Sin reglas ni ataduras, en tus numerosos viajes has vivido incontables aventuras como tripulación pirata. En alta mar te has dado cuenta que el oro del tesoro ha desaparecido y todo el mundo te está mirando a ti.

Elige un nombre para tu pirata con el que a partir de ahora la tripulación se dirigirá a ti, usarás las preguntas del mazo de cartas para resolver las situaciones e intentar sobrevivir.

Todo lo que plantean las cartas es cierto, así que tendrás que usar la persuasión para salvarte.

Lee las cartas en voz alta.
Las partes acusadas responden.
Votad y elegid.
La Última es un sistema de juego narrativo creado por Roberto Alhambra.

Una aventura con 30 cartas, en las que cada una de ellas te planteará situaciones de las que solo podrás librarte con tus mejores argumentos. El juicio pirata comienza. ¿Acabarás siendo alimento para los tiburones?

The ship has suffered massive damage and only one escape pod remains. Will you be saved?

In the Last Capsule the surface of the Earth is in the worst state that human beings can remember. On the verge of collapse, humanity enters a new era: that of space colonization.

Your mission was to start a colony on a new planet, the future of humanity depended on it, but you will not be able to get there, most of the crew has already been evacuated, only a few remain...

Choose a name and an identification number as a crew member, you will use the questions from the deck of cards to resolve the situations and try to save yourself.

Everything the cards say is true, so you'll have to use persuasion to get selected.

Read the cards aloud.
The accused parties respond.
Vote and choose.

La Última is a narrative game system created by Roberto Alhambra.

An adventure with 30 cards, in which each of them will pose situations that you can only get rid of with your best arguments. You are facing the last evacuation capsule. You must decide who will be saved.

---

La nave ha sufrido daños masivos y solo queda una cápsula de escape. ¿Te salvarás?

En la Última Cápsula la superficie de la Tierra en el peor estado que el ser humano recuerda. Al borde del colapso, la humanidad entra en una nueva era: la de la colonización espacial.

Vuestra misión era comenzar una colonia en un nuevo planeta, el futuro de la humanidad dependía de ello, pero no vais a poder llegar, la mayoría de la tripulación ha sido ya evacuada, solo quedáis unos pocos…

Elige un nombre y un número de identificación como tripulante, usarás las preguntas del mazo de cartas para resolver las situaciones e intentar salvarte.

Todo lo que plantean las cartas es cierto, así que tendrás que usar la persuasión para que te seleccionen.

Lee las cartas en voz alta.
Las partes acusadas responden.
Votad y elegid.

La Última es un sistema de juego narrativo creado por Roberto Alhambra.

Una aventura con 30 cartas, en las que cada una de ellas te planteará situaciones de las que solo podrás librarte con tus mejores argumentos Estáis ante la última cápsula de evacuación. Debéis decidir quién se salvará.

The galaxy is in danger! The Galactic Federation is gathering all its forces to deal a crushing blow to the emperor's brutal dictatorship. The empire is also on the alert and is actively calling for an all-season call-in order to give a worthy rebuff and preserve the centuries-old foundations. Soon space will be ablaze.

Up to 4 people can take part in the game, where one will try to defend the interests of the emperor, and the other three will struggle to overthrow him. You will capture colonies, build and expand your fleet, as well as conduct combat operations to impose your regime.

The playing field is a grid of hyper transitions between planets, framed by Events. Each turn, the player rolls the dice and moves through the Events and, if it belongs to his faction, casts it. Then the player has the opportunity to receive and spend money, fly around the galaxy and fight with the enemy.

Players not only move along a grid on the sides of the board, but they also maneuver their fleets and capture planets.  Fleets are rated for their movement ability and firepower. When two fleets meet in the same space there is combat.

In combat, the attacker rolls a die and adds the fleet's power to the roll. The number rolled is the number of ships that the defender must lose.  Following this, the defender retaliates.

The game features quite a lot of beautiful plastic figurines of ships, which will undoubtedly attract the attention of younger players.

Welcome to Rival Guns, the first supplement for Dead by Lead. Within this book, players will find the resources needed to create a rival gang of gunslingers to play against! These new resources include tables for naming your new rivals, and rules for helping them cause havoc in and around the city of Bloodstone. In addition, you will find rules for playing games of Dead by Lead either solo or cooperatively. We have designed three new scenarios for you to play to help showcase these new rules.

What’s in the book: 

     Solo play rules
     Rival character and gang creation 
     3 new gameplay scenarios
     Additional Items 


What do you need to play? 

     BLASTER: Game Magazine 05 – Dead by Lead
     Six to twelve Western miniatures or figurines to represent your gang of characters.
     One twelve-sided (d12) and several six-sided dice (d6) for each player.
     A tape measure or ruler for measuring distances in inches.
     A standard deck of playing cards.


Dead by Lead is best suited to a flat 3' x 3' playing area to represent the battlefield.

Various western terrain or model scenery (red dirt, train tracks, rivers, rocks, city buildings and crates) for visual and tactical interest.

A pencil and tokens to help you keep track of various game mechanics. We recommend using six-sided dice as counters, as several dice are easier to manage than a score of tokens.

description from the publisher's website

Each player gets a challenge card stand and a set of 9 same colored challenge cards. Dealer then shuffles and deals 10 playing cards to each player. Remaining cards are placed in the center of the table (draw pile) Then turn the top card over and set next to the draw pile (discard pile)

The players challenge cards are placed face down in front of the sand. The challenge the player is working on is placed in the stand and challenges the player has completed are place face up behind the stand.

Play: Each player takes the top Brutal Challenge card from their stack and places it in the stand so they can see the challenge they must complete this hand. Player to the left of the dealer starts and can either draw a card from the draw pile or take the top card from the discard pile. They then will discard on card from their hand to the discard pile, this will complete their turn.

Once the player has made the challenge on their challenge card they lay down those cards plus any other cards from the players hand that can be added to that challenge or another players challenge. If the player is able to use all their cards then they have won that hand

The first player who is able to play all their cards each hand receives 1 Brutal token
