The winner is the first player to complete all 9 Challenges and uses all cards in their last hand

Bid on strange and unusual contraband artifacts, collecting the most valuable to become the greatest collector at an auction that peels back the veil of reality and offers what lurks there... if you can outwit the other bidders.

Schmuggleware is a fast-paced bidding game for quick hand to hand play. Every player acts simultaneously so there's no more waiting for your turn to come around! Unique player card backs makes resetting for the next hand fast and simple so you can get playing instead of waiting for complicated setup. Tired of poring over instructions and rules until giving up and just figuring it out as you go? Schmuggleware's rules fit on a single card, making it simple enough for anyone to learn in just a few minutes! By eliminating all the tedious downtime of other games, Schmuggleware promises to keep everyone engaged and entertained.

Gone is the auction game of pure strategy. Whether socializing or competing mercilessly, Schmuggleware's perfectly tuned blend of strategy and chance allows players to start on equal footing before trying to outwit their opponents, never knowing exactly what will be auctioned off next!

-description From publisher's website

Saxony's energy revolution was so impactful that everyone wanted to start using Nucleums in their regions. Australia's huge deposits of uranium were ripe for the taking, leading to visionaries — lured by the vast number of possibilities — visiting the continent and changing it into a new global power. Here, these entrepreneurs have to face new challenges presented by the sheer size of the continent. Fortunately, the clever use of shipping lanes will help them transport resources more efficiently than by rail and even gain access to the nearby island of Tasmania, where a mad scientist conducting his own experiments managed to replicate Elsa's invention, which is now proudly presented as an experimental power plant in the island's capital of Hobart.

Nucleum: Australia comes with a new map that introduces several new concepts and rule changes to the Nucleum base game. Use shipping lanes to expand your networks, build your own coal mines, and try the expert variant with bidding for the experiments.

—description from the publisher

Embark on the adventure of life and discover the treasures of diversity. Visit 23 Polish National Parks, carefully choose your goals to earn as many points as possible. 
As you play, you'll pick park cards and goal cards, arrange them in your planner and look for the best connections between them.

Lemon Game is a competitive party game where your goal is to be the first to make the perfect pitcher of lemonade! 2–4 players will race to sculpt their hands while sabotaging other players and struggling against hazards.

Begin your turn by resolving each Hazard card in your hand. For each Mold, discard a Lemon card. Then do the same for Sun and Fly Hazards. Tip: Holding on to Hazards can be used to get excess ingredients out of your hand without using your action.

Take one action. This is where you can further manipulate your hand and those of your opponents! Actions involve drawing, discarding, and swapping cards from your hand, your opponent's hand, or a set of available face up cards called The Stand. Tip: If an opponent had no Hazards, it may be a good time to swap with them :)

At the end of your turn, you may draw two cards from the Draw Pile, but you do not have to. Tip: Keep an eye on whether or not your opponents are drawing :) If at any time you have three of each Ingredient and no other cards, reveal your hand to win! Tip: An opponent swapping with you can cause you to win on their turn!

Remember, when life gives you lemons, play Lemon Game!
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
In Feral State your mission is to reach the basement of the house and eliminate a slimy creature spreading zombie virus all over the postapocalyptic town.  On your way down you will fight zombies using unique battle system, which involves both luck and skill.

Feral State is a one-page PnP solo dice game. You roll a D6 to attack and the choose which body part you want to hit on a "pizza wheel", where you can choose the rolled number or the opposite side of the "pizza wheel" and do damage to.

You can also get additional rolls to defeat each zombie. You can also collect items like weapons and medikits in order to better overcome the zombies and survive for the boss battle in the basement.

Fast Inning Baseball (FIB) is a solitaire, quick-play, card & dice game inspired by the “condensed game” format of major league baseball websites, where video highlights are shared an inning at a time. The game engine uses a combination of team and individual player qualities to rate teams on scoring ability, home run hitting power, pitching, run prevention and defense.

With FIB, each game will take 10 minutes or less to play and will produce a basic line score including runs, hits, and errors. Pitcher decisions and key AB’s including home runs can also be tracked. Some run scoring events will be automatic, but many will be dependent on pitcher grades, or a pitcher vs. batter matchup. The game was designed to play fast, but provide compelling gameplay and narrative drama.

-description from designer

Apex is a strategic game in which various civilizations vie for galactic dominance through influence, technological advancement, and warfare. Set in a science fiction universe unlike any you've seen before, it features truly alien civilizations, diverging from typical science fiction clichés.
The game is a straightforward and minimalist 4X, taking approximately 15 minutes per player. Victory points are accumulated by controlling sectors at the end of each of the three ages. While winning doesn't necessitate engaging in war, it can yield additional points.
Each age consists of five turns, during which players select a card to play from a drafted hand. Every card provides the option to pursue one of the four strategies: Evolution, Expansion, Colonization, or War, offering players a multitude of choices. Consequently, your overall strategy is not dictated by the civilization you choose or the cards you receive. It's entirely up to you whether you opt for aggressive expansion, technological improvement, war, diplomacy, or a strategic blend of these elements.
Highly symmetrical, with minimal randomness and devoid of the chaos found in more intricate games, Apex poses a chess-like challenge for seasoned strategists. However, its rich universe and straightforward mechanics make it an ideal game for introducing more casual players to strategic gameplay.

—description from the designer

Listen to the question. Choose the right answer. Amass millions of Euros.

—description from the publisher

Story Island is a story creation game for the whole family inspired by traditional Ibiza.

Made up of 64 cards, in each one of them you will find an illustration that represents some element of Ibiza culture and its traditional tales (people, places, animals, mythological beings, etc.) and a written element (emotions, actions, senses, qualities, etc.) useful for the creation of stories.

Inspired by them, you will have to invent a story avoiding the other participants to guess the cards you are going to use. In addition, you will have to guess the cards that the other storytellers will use in their story when it is their turn. And by using your imagination and intuition, you will get point cards to win the game.

A beautifully illustrated game with simple and easy to learn mechanics, but with a great balance of competitiveness-creativity that drives the creation of stories while maintaining enthusiasm and fun.

—description from the publisher

Story Island es un juego de creación de historias para toda la familia inspirado en la Ibiza tradicional.

Formado por 64 cartas, en cada una de ellas encontrarás una ilustración que representa algún elemento de la cultura ibicenca y sus cuentos tradicionales (personas, lugares, animales, seres mitológicos, etc.) y un elemento escrito (emociones, acciones, sentidos, cualidades, etc.) útil para la creación de historias.

Inspirándote en ellas, deberás inventar una historia evitando que el resto de participantes adivinen las cartas que vas a usar. Además, deberás adivinar las cartas que el resto de cuentacuentos usarán en su historia cuando sea su turno. Y usando así tu imaginación e intuición, conseguirás cartas de punto para ganar la partida.

Un juego bellamente ilustrado con una mecánica sencilla y fácil de aprender, pero con un gran equilibrio competitividad-creatividad que impulsa la creación de historias manteniendo el entusiasmo y la diversión.

—description from the publisher (Spanish)
family: Organizations: Board Games Association of Creators in Spain (LUDO)

description:
七転牡蠣～Oyster Dance～ (Shichitenkakki～oisutaadansu～) (Oyster Dance) is a game from Japan in which players are grilling oysters to eat. Players roll the dice and following the icons, they prepare the oysters on the barbecue grill. The oyster tokens must be grilled on both sides and then brought to the plate, but only if the player has acquired slices of lemon first. The first player to get three oysters on their plate is the winner.

The oyster tokens show the normal shell on one side and the open oyster on the other. These open oysters have different face emojis which are matched with the dice. If a player cannot take an oyster (they cannot find a matching face or they do not have a lemon slice), they must turn an oyster face down and take a lemon slice as recompense.

If a player can find a matching face, and they have a lemon slice, they can take the oyster to their plate. Then the grill is spun around so that players forget which oysters are where on the grill.

The game is sold with the components in a round box (10.5 cm round, 5 cm deep) which acts as the charcoal burner. However, the actual metal grill used is too large to fit in the box (22.5cm across) and is supplied separately.
--description by user

World's first! A board game where you grill oysters on a net!
There are three rules to eating fresh oysters from "tajimaya".
(1) Grill them on both sides as they are very fresh.
(2) Always garnish with lemon.
(iii) Say "Itadakimaya" in appreciation of the oysters before you serve them to the plate.
You win if you are the first to welcome three oysters to your plate.

世界初！網の上で牡蠣を焼くボードゲーム！
“タジマヤ(tajimaya)”の新鮮な牡蠣を食べるためには、三つの作法があります。
①活きが良いので両面焼いてください。
②必ずレモンを添えてください。
③牡蠣への感謝をこめて「いただきます」と言ってからお皿にお迎えしてください。
一番最初に牡蠣を三つお皿にお迎え出来たら勝利します。
10.5cmΦ(円形の箱)、深さ5cm＋22.5Φcmの網が付属します。
--description by publisher

The Deluxe edition of Tiny Epic Cthulhu includes Tiny Epic Cthulhu: Astral Artifacts Mini Expansion packaged inside of the base game's box.

The Astral Artifacts mini expansion is a captivating addition that unveils long-forgotten relics from the past, offering invaluable assistance to our valiant heroes in their ongoing struggle. Imbued with cosmic energy, these artifacts were skillfully crafted by artisans of ancient times, only to be lost and concealed from the world for countless centuries. However, as the forces of the Old Ones began to stir, a courageous band of Heroes embarked on a perilous quest to recover these five extraordinary artifacts.

boardgame: Tiny Epic Cthulhu: Cult of Chaos
description:
In the Cult of Chaos expansion, a wicked Cultist of the Shrine emerges, determined to thwart the players' efforts and empower the Great Old One. This malevolent figure seeks to plunge the world into eternal chaos and darkness.

The Cultist of the Shrine possesses the ability to traverse various locations, casting powerful incantations and summoning his devoted followers to wreak havoc upon the unfortunate town. These loyal disciples will go to great lengths to impede your progress and obstruct your path to victory.

Prepare to face the treacherous Cultist as he orchestrates his sinister plans, maneuvering strategically and employing dark magic to fulfill his nefarious objectives. Only by overcoming their malevolent schemes can you hope to restore order and prevent the world from descending into eternal darkness.

The Cult of Chaos expansion also features additional heroes to play, town locations to explore and Great Old Ones to defeat.

It comes in a box of the same height and width (1/2 the depth) and quality of Tiny Epic Cthulhu.

Contains two additional playable characters for Nemesis: Retaliation:

    The UAV Operator is responsible for operating and controlling crewless aircraft that perform surveillance, reconnaissance, attack, or support tasks. He is super proficient in the use of hardware and software, as well as in analyzing data and images from the drone.
    Sharpshooters have been part of military forces for many years, so this is an obvious choice as a new potential squad member. Of course, a close environment is not the perfect place for that type of specialist. However, a soldier with a steady hand and an eagle eye can still be very useful, especially with his beloved sniper rifle.


— description from the publisher.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

boardgame: Pummel & Friends: Kekse für die Glitzerwelt
description:
Every inhabitant of the glittering world loves cookies. But before you can enjoy your cookies with your cocoa in the evening, you need to stock up on a small (or very large) supply of cookies. While the Octogrummel wants to prevent you from collecting cookies, the Pummelfee likes to give away extra cookies. So, which one of you will have collected the most cookies by the end of the game?

—description from the back of the box (translated)

boardgame: もしも勇者がいるのなら (If You Have A Brave)
description:
Explore the exhilarating realms of the 2nd edition SATSUGAI card game, where the woes of unfortunate royalty are a distant memory. This edition has undergone a transformative evolution, refining the essence conceived in the inaugural release.

In this riveting game, the simplicity of choosing a card belies the urge to play repeatedly. The game introduces the formidable Arrored Royalty card, capable of disrupting everything in its path, countered only by the strategic "Another World Brave in Another World" card, creating a delicate balance in the SATUGAI universe. With the core of the gameplay centered around these two captivating cards, SATSUGAI becomes an engaging and unpredictable experience.

Dive into a diverse array of cards, each offering a blend of fun and, at times, chilling effects. The game invites players to immerse themselves in the joy of exploring "Another World," a dimension that unfolds with every card played. The excitement reaches new heights with the addition of the expansion card set, "Tilt Sitters," expanding the possibilities for thrilling gameplay.

Whether reveling in the basic set of cards or delving into the boundless combinations offered by the "Tilt Sitters" expansion, SATSUGAI beckons players to embark on an unlimited deployment of strategic prowess. Get ready to rewrite the rules of engagement and experience the sheer delight of the 2nd edition SATSUGAI card game.

Scientists do not all agree on the chronology of the events ... the volcano then the meteorites or the reverse. However, one thing is certain, the dinosaurs have indeed disappeared!

Certain ? Not quite ... You have just been sent a few hours before their disappearance. Your mission ? Save the best specimens in order to bring the dinosaurs back to life and link your destiny to that of the glorious Tyrannosaurs ... or fail and join that of the Erliansorus ... Which one ?!

Will you be up to the event?

Jurassic Roll is a fast roll & write game with a little part of betting and a lot of combos. It was created for the 9th BGG Roll & Write Contest. It won 4 prizes.

—description from the designer''

A hot auction game with psychological warfare and talk battles!

You arrive at a certain auction venue. However, the true identity is a counterfeit seller! Selling a fake work that has been mixed up with a masterpiece, and winning a bid for a gorgeous masterpiece... I'm going to make a lot of money today...! ! ……eh? In fact, all the participants today are selling counterfeits! ? I-I haven't heard of that! !

Determine the authenticity of the work and get what is truly valuable to you. Counterfeit auction is an auction game that features fun conversations between buyers and sellers and heated psychological warfare.

---

心理戦とトークバトルが熱い競売ゲーム！

とあるオークション会場にやって来たあなた。しかしその正体は贋作売りだ！名作にしれっと紛れ込ませた贋作を売りつけて絢爛豪華な名品を落札…… 今日はボロ儲けだ…！！……えっ？実は今日の参加者全員贋作売り！？そ、そんなの聞いてないよ！！
作品の真贋を見極め、あなたにとって本当に価値のあるものを手に入れましょう。贋作オークションは、売り手と買い手による楽しいトークと熱い心理戦が魅力の競売ゲームです。

全国のイエローサブマリン店舗で販売しております。

Cat Power is the first expansion for Steam Power and introduces two whimsical maps and a mechanic for if you wake up sleeping cats.

The game otherwise plays per the standard rules and the sleeping cats provide an extra layer of the track laying puzzle.

—description from the publisher

Embark on a cultural journey and witness the Miracles of China in this strategic tabletop game. Explore city stories, delve into 49 modern and ancient wonders, and experience the wisdom of the Chinese people.

Features


     Explore 49 modern and ancient wonders of China.
     Develop strategic thinking and observational skills.
     Hone path planning and competitive abilities.


Game Flow


     Purchase Tickets or Travel: Players choose to buy tickets or use existing tickets to travel.
     Exchange Cards: Players discard remaining cards and draw 4 new cards.
     Score Points: Players earn points when stopping at a point matching a tabletop landmark card.
     Draw Cards: If a player obtains a landmark card, reveal a new one to replenish the tabletop.
     Game End: The game concludes when any player's total points from landmark cards reach or exceed 10 and returns to their starting point.

The Undies Expansion adds a new set of cards to the game, showcasing the girls in underwear and lingerie outfits, adding a new dimension and bonus rules which affect how certain actions work within the game.

Currently the Undies Expansion includes an additional 72 cards and a special beach harem game mat. With more content also available via further stretch goals.

The Explicit Expansion adds a new set of cards to the game, showcasing the girls in explicit imagery/complete nude and uncensored, adding a new dimension more sexy cards and another bonus rule-set which will adjust your play-style in the game.

Currently the Explicit Expansion includes an additional 60 cards, but stretch goals can unlock even more content for this expansion and will be announced via Updates.

The Gamer Girls Expansion adds another set of cards to the game, showcasing artworks from our past Dharker Studios games, featuring new Harem Girls, Harem Toys and Harem Pets to play with in the game.

Thanks to our special stretch goals the Game Girls set now includes an additional 54 cards, yet more bonuses could be added to this special pack.

As an additional bonus, anyone who pledges at the £95 reward tier or higher will in addition to the Game Mat Expansion also receive the following bonus items too.

Booster Card Pack: (+69 Additional Cards)

Core Game Booster (An addition 36 cards) 
Undies Booster (An addition 12 cards) 
Gamer Girls Booster (An additional 18 cards) 
Special Themed Cards (An additional 3 cards)
Card Protectors: (350 included)

A set of 350 clear card wallet protectors for all cards

Preferences is a 'get to know you' party game that brings you closer by exploring each other's - you guessed it - preferences! The result? Stories shared. Connections deepened. And a**es laughed off.

It can be played in 3 easy steps: 

     Naughty or nice? The choice is yours! Tailor the game to your group by keeping your removing the rowdy cards. We want grandma to play too! 
     The starting player picks 3 preferences cards and secretly ranks them in order of most liked to least liked. In no particular order, the player will then read the cards to the group. 
     With their combined knowledge, the group will try to guess the player's preferred order through hilarious debates, deliberations, and ah-ha moments, testing how well the group really knows each other. 


I bet you're wondering who the winner is? Well, not everything is a competition Monica, this is just for fun! BUT, if you really can't contain your competitive side, grab a sheet of paper (as your score pad) and a pen. In this version, everyone will guess the player's preferences on their own, no conversing with the group! Whoever guesses right, gets a point. Player who has the most points at the end of the game wins!

We know you're excited to play, so get ready for those "who knew?!" moments, belly laughs, and that warm and fuzzy feeling we all know and love.

Walk away with smiles that never fade, abs that never looked better, and hearts never so full.

—description from the publisher

On a stormy night at an unnamed island, famous pirates gathered at a tavern. These pirate captains had a history of battles and plundering together. As the tavern owner nervously looked on, fearing a major incident, one captain suddenly spoke up.

"Who among us is the strongest pirate?"

In the intense atmosphere, sharper than the storm outside, silence fell. The idea of proving one's strength seemed appealing, but unnecessary bloodshed was a concern. That's when someone suggested:

"The real strong pirate is the one who drinks the most without faltering. Isn't that right? A clear mind and endurance under the influence are the best proofs of strength."

Agreeing to this, they decided to pick the Pirate King through a drinking contest.

Gameplay Overview:

In Rumshot, pirates compete in a drinking contest to be crowned Pirate King. This thematic board game combines strategy and fun, engaging players in a simulated drinking competition where the strongest pirate prevails.

Features:

Thematic Gameplay: Set in the age of piracy, players engage in a land-based drinking battle, embodying the spirit of pirates without setting sail.

Alcohol-Free Fun: Designed to replicate the joy of a drinking party, Rumshot is a true party game for everyone, regardless of drinking preferences.

Unique Cards: With 19th-century pirate-themed illustrations, the game features a variety of cards that bring the pirate era to life, each with different actions and dialogues.

Enduring Play: Even eliminated players can influence the game, ensuring engagement for all until the end.

Game Rules:

Players start with a hand of cards, taking turns to attack or defend using these cards. Each card has unique effects, with symbols indicating attack, defense, or special abilities. The game continues until all but one player are "drunk" (eliminated), leaving the last standing as the winner.

—description from the designer
